h: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
f: futureCond
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
H0: futureSubtraction_linear f
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
forall f1 f2 : futureCond,
f = fc_conj f1 f2 ->
exists f3 f4 : futureCond,
  bigstep h r f1 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f3
    (vloc loc0) /\
  bigstep h r f2 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f4
    (vloc loc0) /\
  fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) =
  fc_conj f3 f4
 
  
h: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
f: futureCond
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
H0: futureSubtraction_linear f
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
f1, f2: futureCond
H1: f = fc_conj f1 f2
exists f3 f4 : futureCond,
  bigstep h r f1 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f3
    (vloc loc0) /\
  bigstep h r f2 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f4
    (vloc loc0) /\
  fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) =
  fc_conj f3 f4
 
h: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
f1, f2: futureCond
H0: futureSubtraction_linear 
  (fc_conj f1 f2)
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
exists f3 f4 : futureCond,
  bigstep h r f1 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f3
    (vloc loc0) /\
  bigstep h r f2 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f4
    (vloc loc0) /\
  fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) =
  fc_conj f3 f4
 
  
h: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
f1, f2: futureCond
H0: futureSubtraction_linear 
  (fc_conj f1 f2)
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
H1: forall (f1 f2 : futureCond) 
  (t : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
futureSubtraction_linear (fc_conj f1 f2) t f3 ->
exists f4 f5 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f1 t f4 /\
  futureSubtraction_linear f2 t f5 /\
  f3 = fc_conj f4 f5
exists f3 f4 : futureCond,
  bigstep h r f1 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f3
    (vloc loc0) /\
  bigstep h r f2 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f4
    (vloc loc0) /\
  fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) =
  fc_conj f3 f4
 
  
h: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
f1, f2: futureCond
H0: futureSubtraction_linear 
  (fc_conj f1 f2)
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
H1: exists f4 f5 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f1
    (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f4 /\
  futureSubtraction_linear f2
    (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f5 /\
  f' = fc_conj f4 f5
exists f3 f4 : futureCond,
  bigstep h r f1 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f3
    (vloc loc0) /\
  bigstep h r f2 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f4
    (vloc loc0) /\
  fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) =
  fc_conj f3 f4
 
h: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
f1, f2: futureCond
H0: futureSubtraction_linear 
  (fc_conj f1 f2)
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
f4, f5: futureCond
H2: futureSubtraction_linear f1
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f4
H1: futureSubtraction_linear f2
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f5
H4: f' = fc_conj f4 f5
exists f3 f4 : futureCond,
  bigstep h r f1 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f3
    (vloc loc0) /\
  bigstep h r f2 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f4
    (vloc loc0) /\
  fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) =
  fc_conj f3 f4

  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist
  (fc_conj f4 f5)

  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f4

  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f5
exists f3 f6 : futureCond,
  bigstep h r f1 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f3
    (vloc loc0) /\
  bigstep h r f2 (pref (pval v))
    (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist) f6
    (vloc loc0) /\
  fc_conj (fc_conj f4 f5)
    (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) =
  fc_conj f3 f6

  (fc_conj f1 f2)
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist
  (fc_conj f4 f5)

  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f4

  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f5

  (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (fc_conj f4 (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))

  (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (fc_conj f5 (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (vloc loc0) /\
fc_conj (fc_conj f4 f5)
  (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) =
fc_conj
  (fc_conj f4 (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (fc_conj f5 (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))

r: rho

v: val

  (fc_conj f1 f2)
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist
  (fc_conj f4 f5)
H2: futureSubtraction_linear f1
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f4
H1: futureSubtraction_linear f2
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f5
fc_conj
  (fc_conj f4 (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (fc_conj f5 (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0)))) =
fc_conj
  (fc_conj f4 (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (fc_conj f5 (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  reflexivity.

Qed.  


Axiom big_step_nil_context: forall h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 h3 rho2 f3 v rho3 f0  f_ctx', 
  bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v -> 
  rho2 = (rho1 ++ rho3) -> 
  bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h3 rho3 f0 v -> 
  futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx' ->
  f3 = fc_conj f0 f_ctx'.



Axiom futureCondEntail_fc_der_indicate: forall f f3 ev0 f_der, 
  futureCondEntail f f3 ->  fc_der f ev0 f_der -> 
  f_der <> fc_singleton bot -> 
  exists deriv, fc_der f3 ev0 deriv /\ deriv <> fc_singleton bot. 

Axiom fc_singleton_is_not_conj : forall t f1 f2, 
  fc_singleton t <> fc_conj f1 f2. 

Axiom futureCondEntail_conj_left_indicates: forall f f0 f1 f2, 
  futureCondEntail f f0 ->  f = (fc_conj f1 f2) -> 
  futureCondEntail f1 f0 \/ futureCondEntail f2 f0.



forall (f1 : futureCond) (rho3 : rho)
  (f2 f3 : futureCond),
futureSubtraction_linear f1 rho3 f2 ->
futureCondEntail f1 f3 ->
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f3 rho3 f4 /\
  futureCondEntail f2 f4
 

forall (f1 : futureCond) (rho3 : rho)
  (f2 f3 : futureCond),
futureSubtraction_linear f1 rho3 f2 ->
futureCondEntail f1 f3 ->
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f3 rho3 f4 /\
  futureCondEntail f2 f4
 
  
f1: futureCond
rho3: rho
f2, f3: futureCond
H: futureSubtraction_linear f1 rho3 f2
H0: futureCondEntail f1 f3
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f3 rho3 f4 /\
  futureCondEntail f2 f4
 
  
f1: futureCond
rho3: rho
f2: futureCond
H: futureSubtraction_linear f1 rho3 f2
forall f3 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f1 f3 ->
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f3 rho3 f4 /\
  futureCondEntail f2 f4

  
f1, f2, f3, f4: futureCond
t: rho
H: futureSubtraction_linear f1 t f3
H0: futureSubtraction_linear f2 t f4
IHfutureSubtraction_linear1: forall f4 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f1 f4 ->
exists f5 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear
    f4 t f5 /\
  futureCondEntail f3 f5
IHfutureSubtraction_linear2: forall f3 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f2 f3 ->
exists f5 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear
    f3 t f5 /\
  futureCondEntail f4 f5
forall f5 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f1 f2) f5 ->
exists f6 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f5 t f6 /\
  futureCondEntail (fc_conj f3 f4) f6
f: futureCond
forall f3 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f f3 ->
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f3 nil f4 /\
  futureCondEntail f f4
ev0: event
f, f_der: futureCond
t, t_der: list event
res: futureCond
H: fc_der f ev0 f_der
H0: f_der <> fc_singleton bot
H1: t = (ev0 :: t_der)%mylist
H2: futureSubtraction_linear f_der t_der res
IHfutureSubtraction_linear: forall f3 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f_der f3 ->
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear
    f3 t_der f4 /\
  futureCondEntail res f4
forall f3 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f f3 ->
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f3 t f4 /\
  futureCondEntail res f4
 
  
f1, f2, f3, f4: futureCond
t: rho
H: futureSubtraction_linear f1 t f3
H0: futureSubtraction_linear f2 t f4
IHfutureSubtraction_linear1: forall f4 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f1 f4 ->
exists f5 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear
    f4 t f5 /\
  futureCondEntail f3 f5
IHfutureSubtraction_linear2: forall f3 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f2 f3 ->
exists f5 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear
    f3 t f5 /\
  futureCondEntail f4 f5
forall f5 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f1 f2) f5 ->
exists f6 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f5 t f6 /\
  futureCondEntail (fc_conj f3 f4) f6

  
f1, f2, f3, f4: futureCond
t: rho
H: futureSubtraction_linear f1 t f3
H0: futureSubtraction_linear f2 t f4
IHfutureSubtraction_linear1: forall f4 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f1 f4 ->
exists f5 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear
    f4 t f5 /\
  futureCondEntail f3 f5
IHfutureSubtraction_linear2: forall f3 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f2 f3 ->
exists f5 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear
    f3 t f5 /\
  futureCondEntail f4 f5
f0: futureCond
H1: futureCondEntail (fc_conj f1 f2) f0
exists f5 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f0 t f5 /\

f: futureCond
forall f3 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f f3 ->
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f3 nil f4 /\
  futureCondEntail f f4

  futureSubtraction_linear f3 nil f4 /\
  futureCondEntail f f4

forall (f_ctx : futureCond) (t : theta)
  (f_ctx' : futureCond) (rho3 : rho),
futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
trace_model rho3 t ->
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx'0


forall (f_ctx : futureCond) (t : theta)
  (f_ctx' : futureCond) (rho3 : rho),
futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
trace_model rho3 t ->
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx'0

t: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
rho3: rho
H: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
H0: trace_model rho3 t
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx'0

  futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx'0

trace_model rho3 bot ->
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f1 rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail f2 f_ctx'0

t: theta
H: futureSubtraction f1 t f3
H0: futureSubtraction f2 t f4

trace_model rho3 t ->
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f1
    rho3 f_ctx'0 /\

trace_model rho3 t ->

  futureSubtraction_linear f2
    rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail f4 f_ctx'0

trace_model rho3 t ->
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear (fc_conj f1 f2) rho3
    f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail (fc_conj f3 f4) f_ctx'0
t: theta
forall rho3 : rho,
trace_model rho3 emp ->
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear 
    (fc_singleton t) rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail (fc_singleton t) f_ctx'0

t, t_der: theta
res: futureCond

H0: f_der <> fc_singleton bot

trace_model rho3 t_der ->
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f_der
    rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail res f_ctx'0

H4: futureCondEntail f3 f_ctx'0
IHfutureSubtraction2: exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f2
    rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail f4 f_ctx'0
H1: trace_model rho3 t
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear (fc_conj f1 f2) rho3
    f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail (fc_conj f3 f4) f_ctx'0

H6: futureCondEntail f4 f_ctx'1

exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear (fc_conj f1 f2) rho3
    f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail (fc_conj f3 f4) f_ctx'0

  futureCondEntail (fc_singleton t) f_ctx'0

H4: forall (t1 : theta) (ev0 : event)
  (deriv1 : theta) (rho0 : rho),
theta_der t1 ev0 deriv1 ->
deriv1 <> bot ->
trace_model rho0 t1 ->
exists rho1 : list event,
  rho0 = (ev0 :: rho1)%mylist /\
  trace_model rho1 deriv1

  futureSubtraction_linear f rho3 f_ctx'0 /\

trace_model rho3 t_der ->

  futureSubtraction_linear f_der
    rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail res f_ctx'0
rho3: rho
H3: trace_model rho3 t
H5: t_der <> bot
H4: exists rho1 : list event,
  rho3 = (ev0 :: rho1)%mylist /\
  trace_model rho1 t_der
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail res f_ctx'0

forall (f_ctx : futureCond) (t : theta)
  (f_ctx' : futureCond) (rho3 : rho) (h1 : heap)
  (e : expr) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho)
  (f3 : futureCond) (v : val) (f0 : futureCond),
futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
trace_model rho3 t ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 (rho1 ++ rho3) f3 v ->
bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3

bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3

  (f3 : futureCond) (v : val) (rho3 : list event)
  (rho1 : rho) (f : futureCond),
bigstep h3 rho1 f e h2 rho0 f3 v ->
bigstep h3 (rho3 ++ rho1) f e h2 (rho3 ++ rho0) f3 v

  (f3 : futureCond) (v : val) (rho3 : list event)
  (rho1 : rho) (f : futureCond),

bigstep h3 (rho3 ++ rho1) f e h2 (rho3 ++ rho0) f3 v

h2: heap

h2: heap

h1, h2, h3: heap
x: var
e1, e2: expr
v, r: val
rho1, rho2, rho3: rho
f1, f2, f3: futureCond
H: bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v
H0: bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r
IHbigstep1: forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1 e1 h2
  (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v
IHbigstep2: forall rho4 : list event,
bigstep h2 (rho4 ++ rho2) f2
  (subst x v e2) h3 (rho4 ++ rho3) f3 r
forall rho4 : list event,
bigstep h1 (rho4 ++ rho1) f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3
  (rho4 ++ rho3) f3 r
h: heap
r: rho
f: futureCond
v: val
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pval v) h (rho3 ++ r) f v
h: heap
r: rho
f: futureCond
e1, e2: expr
h': heap
r': rho
f': futureCond
v: val
H: bigstep h r f e1 h' r' f' v
IHbigstep: forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f e1 h' 
  (rho3 ++ r') f' v
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f
  (pif (pval (vbool true)) e1 e2) h' 
  (rho3 ++ r') f' v
h: heap
r: rho
f: futureCond
e1, e2: expr
h': heap
r': rho
f': futureCond
v: val
H: bigstep h r f e2 h' r' f' v
IHbigstep: forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f e2 h' 
  (rho3 ++ r') f' v
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f
  (pif (pval (vbool false)) e1 e2) h' 
  (rho3 ++ r') f' v
h: heap
r: rho
f, f_assume: futureCond
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (passume f_assume) h
  (rho3 ++ r) (fc_conj f f_assume) vunit
h: heap
r: rho
f: futureCond
ev0: event
f': futureCond
H: futureSubtraction_linear f (ev0 :: nil)%mylist f'
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pevent ev0) h
  (rho3 ++ r ++ (ev0 :: nil)%mylist) f' vunit
h: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
r: rho
f: futureCond
loc0: loc
H: Fmap.indom h loc0
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pderef (pval (vloc loc0))) h
  (rho3 ++ r) f (Fmap.read h loc0)
h: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
r: rho
f: futureCond
loc0: loc
v: val
H: Fmap.indom h loc0
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f
  (passign (pval (vloc loc0)) (pval v))
  (Fmap.update h loc0 v) 
  (rho3 ++ r) f vunit
fromal_arg: var
e: expr
actual_arg: val
h1, h2: heap
rho1, rho2: rho
f1, f2: futureCond
v: val
H: bigstep h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
  h2 rho2 f2 v
IHbigstep: forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2
  (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1
  (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e)) (pval actual_arg))
  h2 (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v
h: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
f: futureCond
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
H0: futureSubtraction_linear f
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pref (pval v))
  (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
  (rho3 ++
   r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (vloc loc0)

x: var

v, r: val

H0: bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r

bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1 e1 h2
  (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v
IHbigstep2: forall rho4 : list event,
bigstep h2 (rho4 ++ rho2) f2
  (subst x v e2) h3 (rho4 ++ rho3) f3 r
forall rho4 : list event,
bigstep h1 (rho4 ++ rho1) f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3
  (rho4 ++ rho3) f3 r

  (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr) 
  (v r : val) (rho1 rho2 rho3 : rho)
  (f1 f2 f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v ->
bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3 rho3 f3 r

x: var
e1, e2: expr
v, r: val
rho1, rho2, rho3: rho

H0: bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r

  (rho0 ++ rho2) f2 v
IHbigstep2: bigstep h2 (rho0 ++ rho2) f2
  (subst x v e2) h3 (rho0 ++ rho3) f3 r
H1: bigstep h1 (rho0 ++ rho1) f1 
  (plet x e1 e2) h3 (rho0 ++ rho3) f3 r
bigstep h1 (rho0 ++ rho1) f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3
  (rho0 ++ rho3) f3 r
 
  exact H1.
  
h: heap
r: rho
f: futureCond
v: val
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pval v) h (rho3 ++ r) f v

r: rho
f: futureCond
v: val
rho3: list event
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pval v) h (rho3 ++ r) f v

  constructor.

h: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
f: futureCond
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
H0: futureSubtraction_linear f
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pref (pval v))
  (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
  (rho3 ++
   r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (vloc loc0)

  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
rho3: list event
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pref (pval v))
  (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
  (rho3 ++
   r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (vloc loc0)

  (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
  ((rho3 ++ r) ++
   (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (vloc loc0)

forall (A B : Type) (h1 h2 h3 : Fmap.fmap A B),
Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 ->
Fmap.disjoint h2 h3 ->
Fmap.disjoint h1 h3 -> Fmap.disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3)
 

forall (A B : Type) (h1 h2 h3 : Fmap.fmap A B),
Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 ->
Fmap.disjoint h2 h3 ->
Fmap.disjoint h1 h3 -> Fmap.disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3)
 
  
A, B: Type
h1, h2, h3: Fmap.fmap A B
H: Fmap.disjoint h1 h2
H0: Fmap.disjoint h2 h3
H1: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
Fmap.disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3)

    
A, B: Type
h1, h2, h3: Fmap.fmap A B
H: Fmap.disjoint h1 h2
H0: Fmap.disjoint h2 h3
H1: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
H2: forall (A B : Type) (h1 h2 h3 : fmap A B),
disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3) =
(disjoint h1 h2 /\ disjoint h1 h3)
Fmap.disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3)
 
  
(* info eauto: *)
(*external*) fmap_disjoint_pre.
exact H.
exact H1.

Qed. 

Axiom h_subst_pure: forall (t1:loc) t2, t1 = t2.  





forall (P : hprop) (e : expr) (Q : val -> hprop)
  (t1 t2 : theta) (rho1 rho2 : rho) (h1 : heap)
  (v : val) (h2 : heap) (f1 f2 f3 : futureCond),
forward P t1 f1 e Q t2 f2 ->
P h1 ->
trace_model rho1 t1 ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\ futureCondEntail f2 f3
  

forall (P : hprop) (e : expr) (Q : val -> hprop)
  (t1 t2 : theta) (rho1 rho2 : rho) (h1 : heap)
  (v : val) (h2 : heap) (f1 f2 f3 : futureCond),
forward P t1 f1 e Q t2 f2 ->
P h1 ->
trace_model rho1 t1 ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\ futureCondEntail f2 f3

e: expr
Q: val -> hprop
t1, t2: theta
rho1, rho2: rho
h1: heap
v: val
h2: heap
f1, f2, f3: futureCond
forward P t1 f1 e Q t2 f2 ->
P h1 ->
trace_model rho1 t1 ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\ futureCondEntail f2 f3

e: expr
Q: val -> hprop
t1, t2: theta
rho1, rho2: rho
h1: heap
v: val
h2: heap
f1, f2, f3: futureCond
H: forward P t1 f1 e Q t2 f2
H0: P h1
H1: trace_model rho1 t1
H2: bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f3 v
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\ futureCondEntail f2 f3
 
  
P: hprop
e: expr
Q: val -> hprop
t1, t2: theta
f1, f2: futureCond
H: forward P t1 f1 e Q t2 f2
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 t1 ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\ futureCondEntail f2 f3

  
P1: hprop
P2: val -> hprop
P3: hprop
P4: val -> hprop
t': theta
f': futureCond
t: theta
f: futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f'
H0: P1 ==> P3
H1: P4 ===> P2
H2: inclusion t' t
H3: futureCondEntail f f'
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P3 h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
P4 v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t' /\
futureCondEntail f' f3
forall h1 : heap,
P1 h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
P2 v h2 /\ trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3

e1, e2: expr
P: hprop
Q, Q1: val -> hprop
t2, t3: theta
f2, f3: futureCond
H: forward P emp fc_default e1 Q t2 f2
H0: forall v : val,
forward (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3
H1: forall (v : val) (h1 : heap),
Q v h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 t2 ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f4 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f2 (subst x v e2) h2 rho2 f4 v0 ->
Q1 v0 h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t3 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f4
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e1 h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\
futureCondEntail f2 f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f4 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (plet x e1 e2) h2 rho2 f4 v ->
Q1 v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t3 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f4
v: val
P: hprop
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (pval v) h2 rho2 f3 v0 ->
(P \* \[v0 = v]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3
P: hprop
ev0: event
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (pevent ev0) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (theta_singleton ev0) /\
futureCondEntail fc_default f3
b: bool
e1, e2: expr
t: theta
f: futureCond
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
H: forward P emp fc_default 
  (if b then e1 else e2) Q t f
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (if b then e1 else e2) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (pif (pval (vbool b)) e1 e2) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\ trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3
loc0: loc
v: Val.value
forall h1 : heap,
(loc0 ~~> v) h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default 
  (pderef (pval (vloc loc0))) h2 rho2 f3 v0 ->
(loc0 ~~> v \* \[v0 = v]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3
loc0: loc
v: val
v': Val.value
forall h1 : heap,
(loc0 ~~> v') h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (passign (pval (vloc loc0)) (pval v)) h2 rho2 f3 v0 ->
(loc0 ~~> v \* \[v0 = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3

f1: futureCond
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (passume f1) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail f1 f3

e: expr
actual_arg: val
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f: futureCond
H: forward P emp fc_default
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) Q t f
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2 rho2
  f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e)) (pval actual_arg))
  h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\ trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp fc_default e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 t_ctx ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default 
  (pref (pval v)) h2 rho2 f3 v0 ->
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[v0 = vloc h]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h))))) f3

  
P1: hprop
P2: val -> hprop
P3: hprop
P4: val -> hprop
t': theta
f': futureCond
t: theta
f: futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f'
H0: P1 ==> P3
H1: P4 ===> P2
H2: inclusion t' t
H3: futureCondEntail f f'
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P3 h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
P4 v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t' /\
futureCondEntail f' f3
forall h1 : heap,

forward (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3
H1: forall (v : val) (h1 : heap),
Q v h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 t2 ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f4 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f2 (subst x v e2) h2 rho2 f4 v0 ->
Q1 v0 h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t3 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f4
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e1 h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\
futureCondEntail f2 f3

H2: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H3: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f0: futureCond
h3: heap
v0: val
rho3: rho
f4: futureCond
H15: bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e1 h3 rho3 f4 v0
H16: bigstep h3 rho3 f4 (subst x v0 e2) h2 rho2 f0 v
Q1 v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t3 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f0

  (f1 : futureCond) (e : expr) 
  (h2 : heap) (r2 : rho)

loc0: loc
v: val
v': Val.value
forall h1 : heap,
(loc0 ~~> v') h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (passign (pval (vloc loc0)) (pval v)) h2 rho2 f3 v0 ->
(loc0 ~~> v \* \[v0 = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3

v: val

h1: heap

v0: val

rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H2: bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (passign (pval (vloc loc0)) (pval v)) h2 rho2
  f3 v0
(loc0 ~~> v \* \[v0 = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3

v: val

rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
forall (h : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value) (r : rho)
  (f : futureCond) (loc1 : loc) (v1 : val),
Fmap.indom h1 loc0 ->
h = h1 ->
r = rho1 ->
f = fc_default ->
loc1 = loc0 ->
v1 = v ->
Fmap.update h1 loc0 v = h2 ->
rho1 = rho2 ->
fc_default = f3 ->
vunit = v0 ->
(loc0 ~~> v \* \[vunit = vunit])
  (Fmap.update h1 loc0 v) /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\
futureCondEntail fc_default fc_default

Fmap.indom_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.indom (Fmap.single x v) x
indom_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  indom (single x v) x
H0: h1 = Fmap.single loc0 v'
hsingle_intro:
  forall (p : loc) (v : Val.value),
  (p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)
Fmap.disjoint_single_single_same_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [x : A] [v1 v2 : B],
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x v1) (Fmap.single x v2) ->
  False
disjoint_single_single_same_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [x : A] [v1 v2 : B],
  disjoint (single x v1) (single x v2) -> False
Fmap.indom_single_eq:
  forall [A B : Type] (x y : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.indom (Fmap.single x v) y = (x = y)
indom_single_eq:
  forall [A B : Type] (x y : A) (v : B),
  indom (single x v) y = (x = y)
Fmap.read_single:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B} (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.read (Fmap.single x v) x = v
hsingle_inv:
  forall [p : loc] [v : Val.value] [h : heap],
  (p ~~> v) h -> h = Fmap.single p v
read_single:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B} (x : A) (v : B),
  read (single x v) x = v
fmap_not_indom_of_neq:
  forall (A B : Type) (a b : A) (v : B),
  a <> b -> ~ Fmap.indom (Fmap.single a v) b
Fmap.remove_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.remove (Fmap.single x v) x = Fmap.empty
remove_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  remove (single x v) x = empty
Fmap.update_empty:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.update Fmap.empty x v = Fmap.single x v
update_empty:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  update empty x v = single x v
Fmap.update_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v w : B),
  Fmap.update (Fmap.single x v) x w = Fmap.single x w
update_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v w : B),
  update (single x v) x w = single x w
disjoint_single_set:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [l : A] [v1 : B]
    (v2 : B),
  disjoint (single l v1) h -> disjoint (single l v2) h
Fmap.disjoint_single_set:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [l : A]
    [v1 : B] (v2 : B),
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v1) h ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v2) h
disjoint_single_of_not_indom:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> disjoint (single x v) h
Fmap.disjoint_single_single:
  forall [A B : Type] [x1 x2 : A] (v1 v2 : B),
  x1 <> x2 ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x1 v1)
    (Fmap.single x2 v2)
Fmap.disjoint_single_of_not_indom:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x v) h
disjoint_single_single:
  forall [A B : Type] [x1 x2 : A] (v1 v2 : B),
  x1 <> x2 -> disjoint (single x1 v1) (single x2 v2)
Fmap.update_eq_union_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : Fmap.fmap A B) (x : A)
    (v : B), Fmap.update h x v = Fmap.single x v \u h
update_eq_union_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : fmap A B) (x : A) (v : B),
  update h x v = single x v \u h
single_fresh:
  forall [B : Type] (null : nat) (h : fmap nat B)
    (v : B),
  exists l : nat, disjoint (single l v) h /\ l <> null
Fmap.single_fresh:
  forall [B : Type] (null : nat) (h : Fmap.fmap nat B)
    (v : B),
  exists l : nat,
    Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v) h /\ l <> null
Fmap.remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.remove (Fmap.single x v \u h) x = h
remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> remove (single x v \u h) x = h
Fmap.conseq_cons:
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  Fmap.conseq (v :: vs) l =
  Fmap.single l v \u Fmap.conseq vs (S l)
conseq_cons:
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  conseq (v :: vs) l = single l v \u conseq vs (S l)
Fmap.disjoint_single_conseq:
  forall [B : Type] [l l' : nat] (L : list B) (v : B),
  (l < l')%nat \/ (l >= l' + length L)%nat ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v) (Fmap.conseq L l')
disjoint_single_conseq:
  forall [B : Type] [l l' : nat] (L : list B) (v : B),
  (l < l')%nat \/ (l >= l' + length L)%nat ->
  disjoint (single l v) (conseq L l')
Fmap.conseq_cons':
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  Fmap.conseq (v :: vs) l =
  Fmap.single l v \u Fmap.conseq vs (l + 1)
conseq_cons':
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  conseq (v :: vs) l = single l v \u conseq vs (l + 1)

v: val
v': Val.value
h1: heap
H0: h1 = Fmap.single loc0 v'
rho2: rho
H1: trace_model rho2 emp
H11: Fmap.indom h1 loc0
(loc0 ~~> v) (Fmap.single loc0 v)

h1: heap
H0: (loc0 ~~> v') h1

P: hprop
f1: futureCond
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (passume f1) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail f1 f3

  
P: hprop
f1: futureCond
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H2: bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default 
  (passume f1) h2 rho2 f3 v
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail f1 f3

  
P: hprop
f1: futureCond
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f f_assume : futureCond),
h = h1 ->
r = rho1 ->
f = fc_default ->
f_assume = f1 ->
h1 = h2 ->
rho1 = rho2 ->
fc_conj fc_default f1 = f3 ->
vunit = v ->
(P \* \[vunit = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\
futureCondEntail f1 (fc_conj fc_default f1)

  
P: hprop
f1: futureCond
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
h: heap
r: rho
f, f_assume: futureCond
H: h = h1
H3: r = rho1
H4: f = fc_default
H6: f_assume = f1
H5: h1 = h2
H7: rho1 = rho2
H8: fc_conj fc_default f1 = f3
H9: vunit = v
(P \* \[vunit = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\
futureCondEntail f1 (fc_conj fc_default f1)

H1: trace_model rho2 emp

futureCondEntail f1 (fc_conj fc_default f1)

e: expr
actual_arg: val
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f: futureCond
H: forward P emp fc_default
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) Q t f
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2 rho2
  f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e)) (pval actual_arg))
  h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\ trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3

P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp fc_default e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 t_ctx ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

Q: val -> hprop

f, f_ctx: futureCond

f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp fc_default e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
h1: heap
v: val
IHforward: forall (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->

H1: P h1
h2: heap
rho1: rho

rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v
H4: forall (h1 : heap) (rho1 : rho) 
  (f1 : futureCond) (e : expr) 
  (h2 : heap) (rho2 : rho) 
  (f2 : futureCond) (v : val) 
  (rho0 : rho) (f : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f2 v ->
exists (rho3 : list event) 
(f3 : futureCond),
  bigstep h1 rho0 f e h2 (rho0 ++ rho3) f3 v /\
  rho2 = rho1 ++ rho3
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3
 
  
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp fc_default e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
h1: heap
v: val
IHforward: forall (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
H1: P h1
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v
H4: exists (rho3 : list event) 
(f3 : futureCond),
  bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 
    (nil ++ rho3) f3 v /\ 
  rho2 = rho1 ++ rho3
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

H: forward P emp fc_default e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
h1: heap
v: val
h2: heap
rho3: list event
f0: futureCond
H4: Q v h2
H8: trace_model rho3 t
H9: futureCondEntail f f0
H1: P h1
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 (rho1 ++ rho3) f3 v
H5: bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v
H6: futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3
H7: futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f)
  (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3 ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3
 
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp fc_default e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
h1: heap
v: val
h2: heap
rho3: list event
f0: futureCond
H4: Q v h2
H8: trace_model rho3 t
H9: futureCondEntail f f0
H1: P h1
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 (rho1 ++ rho3) f3 v
H5: bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v
H6: futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3
H7: futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f)
  (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3 ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3
   
  exact H6.  

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (pref (pval v)) h2 rho2 f3
  v0 ->
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[v0 = vloc h]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h))))) f3
 
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v0: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H2: bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default 
  (pref (pval v)) h2 rho2 f3 v0
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[v0 = vloc h]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h))))) f3

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v0: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
forall (h0 : Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value) (r : rho)
  (f : futureCond) (loc0 : Logic.loc) (v1 : val)
  (f' : futureCond),
~ Fmap.indom h1 loc0 ->
futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f' ->
h0 = h1 ->
r = rho1 ->
f = fc_default ->
v1 = v ->
Fmap.update h1 loc0 v = h2 ->
rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist = rho2 ->
fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) = f3 ->
vloc loc0 = v0 ->
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc loc0 = vloc h])
  (Fmap.update h1 loc0 v) /\
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v0: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
h0: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
f: futureCond
loc0: Logic.loc
v1: val
f': futureCond
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 loc0
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
H4: h0 = h1
H5: r = rho1
H6: f = fc_default
H: v1 = v
H8: Fmap.update h1 loc0 v = h2
H9: rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist =
rho2
H10: fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) =
f3
H11: vloc loc0 = v0
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc loc0 = vloc h])
  (Fmap.update h1 loc0 v) /\
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
 
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
loc0: Logic.loc
f': futureCond
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 loc0
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc loc0 = vloc h])
  (Fmap.update h1 loc0 v) /\
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))

  
P: hprop
v: val

H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
loc0: Logic.loc
f': futureCond
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 loc0
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
H: forall t1 t2 : loc, t1 = t2
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc loc0 = vloc h])
  (Fmap.update h1 loc0 v) /\
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
loc0: Logic.loc
f': futureCond
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 loc0
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
H: loc0 = h
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc loc0 = vloc h])
  (Fmap.update h1 loc0 v) /\
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\

     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))

P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.update h1 h v) /\
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
