        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
  
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.update h1 h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
fmap_indom_empty:
  forall (A B : Type) (k : A), ~ indom empty k
fmap_not_indom_of_neq:
  forall (A B : Type) (a b : A) (v : B),
  a <> b -> ~ Fmap.indom (Fmap.single a v) b
Fmap.disjoint_single_of_not_indom:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x v) h
disjoint_single_of_not_indom:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> disjoint (single x v) h
fmap_disjoint_indom:
  forall (A B : Type) (h1 h2 : fmap A B) (x : A),
  disjoint h1 h2 -> indom h1 x -> ~ indom h2 x
Fmap.exists_fresh:
  forall [B : Type] (null : nat) (h : Fmap.fmap nat B),
  exists l : nat, ~ Fmap.indom h l /\ l <> null
exists_fresh:
  forall [B : Type] (null : nat) (h : fmap nat B),
  exists l : nat, ~ indom h l /\ l <> null
Fmap.disjoint_update_not_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 ->
  ~ Fmap.indom h2 x ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.update h1 x v) h2
disjoint_update_not_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 : fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  disjoint h1 h2 ->
  ~ indom h2 x -> disjoint (update h1 x v) h2
Fmap.remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.remove (Fmap.single x v \u h) x = h
remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> remove (single x v \u h) x = h
Fmap.read_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B}
    [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B] (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A],
  ~ Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.read (h1 \u h2) x = Fmap.read h2 x
read_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B} [h1 : fmap A B]
    (h2 : fmap A B) [x : A],
  ~ indom h1 x -> read (h1 \u h2) x = read h2 x
update_union_not_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : fmap A B] (h2 : fmap A B)
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h1 x ->
  update (h1 \u h2) x v = h1 \u update h2 x v
Fmap.update_union_not_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 : Fmap.fmap A B)
    [h2 : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h2 x ->
  Fmap.update (h1 \u h2) x v =
  Fmap.update h1 x v \u h2
update_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : fmap A B] (h2 : fmap A B)
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h1 x ->
  update (h1 \u h2) x v = h1 \u update h2 x v
update_union_not_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 : fmap A B) [h2 : fmap A B]
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h2 x ->
  update (h1 \u h2) x v = update h1 x v \u h2
Fmap.update_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B]
    (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.update (h1 \u h2) x v =
  h1 \u Fmap.update h2 x v
Fmap.update_union_not_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B]
    (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.update (h1 \u h2) x v =
  h1 \u Fmap.update h2 x v
eval_malloc:
  forall [h : Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value] (r : rho)
    [f : futureCond] [loc : Logic.loc] (v : val)
    [f' : futureCond],
  ~ Fmap.indom h loc ->
  futureSubtraction_linear f
    (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist f' ->
  bigstep h r f (pref (pval v)) (Fmap.update h loc v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist)
    (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc))))
    (vloc loc)
bigstep_ind:
  forall
    P : heap ->
        rho ->
        futureCond ->
        expr ->
        heap -> rho -> futureCond -> val -> Prop,
  (forall (h1 h2 h3 : heap) (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr)
     (v r : val) (rho1 rho2 rho3 : rho)
     (f1 f2 f3 : futureCond),
   bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r ->
   P h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3 rho3 f3 r) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (v : val), P h r f (pval v) h r f v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (e1 e2 : expr) (h' : heap) (r' : rho)
     (f' : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h r f e1 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f e1 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f (pif (pval (vbool true)) e1 e2) h' r' f' v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (e1 e2 : expr) (h' : heap) (r' : rho)
     (f' : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h r f e2 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f e2 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f (pif (pval (vbool false)) e1 e2) h' r' f' v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho)
     (f f_assume : futureCond),
   P h r f (passume f_assume) h r (fc_conj f f_assume)
     vunit) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (ev : event) (f' : futureCond),
   futureSubtraction_linear f (ev :: nil)%mylist f' ->
   P h r f (pevent ev) h (r ++ (ev :: nil)%mylist) f'
     vunit) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value) (r : rho)
     (f : futureCond) (loc0 : loc),
   Fmap.indom h loc0 ->
   P h r f (pderef (pval (vloc loc0))) h r f
     (Fmap.read h loc0)) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value) (r : rho)
     (f : futureCond) (loc0 : loc) (v : val),
   Fmap.indom h loc0 ->
   P h r f (passign (pval (vloc loc0)) (pval v))
     (Fmap.update h loc0 v) r f vunit) ->
  (forall (fromal_arg : var) (e : expr)
     (actual_arg : val) (h1 h2 : heap)
     (rho1 rho2 : rho) (f1 f2 : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
     h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2
     rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1
     (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e))
        (pval actual_arg)) h2 rho2 f2 v) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value)
     (r : rho) (f : futureCond) (loc : Logic.loc)
     (v : val) (f' : futureCond),
   ~ Fmap.indom h loc ->
   futureSubtraction_linear f
     (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist f' ->
   P h r f (pref (pval v)) (Fmap.update h loc v)
     (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist)
     (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc))))
     (vloc loc)) ->
  forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
    (e : expr) (h0 : heap) (r0 : rho)
    (f0 : futureCond) (v : val),
  bigstep h r f e h0 r0 f0 v -> P h r f e h0 r0 f0 v
bigstep_sind:
  forall
    P : heap ->
        rho ->
        futureCond ->
        expr ->
        heap -> rho -> futureCond -> val -> SProp,
  (forall (h1 h2 h3 : heap) (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr)
     (v r : val) (rho1 rho2 rho3 : rho)
     (f1 f2 f3 : futureCond),
   bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r ->
   P h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3 rho3 f3 r) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (v : val), P h r f (pval v) h r f v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (e1 e2 : expr) (h' : heap) (r' : rho)
     (f' : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h r f e1 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f e1 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f (pif (pval (vbool true)) e1 e2) h' r' f' v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (e1 e2 : expr) (h' : heap) (r' : rho)
     (f' : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h r f e2 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f e2 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f (pif (pval (vbool false)) e1 e2) h' r' f' v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho)
     (f f_assume : futureCond),
   P h r f (passume f_assume) h r (fc_conj f f_assume)
     vunit) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (ev : event) (f' : futureCond),
   futureSubtraction_linear f (ev :: nil)%mylist f' ->
   P h r f (pevent ev) h (r ++ (ev :: nil)%mylist) f'
     vunit) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value) (r : rho)
     (f : futureCond) (loc0 : loc),
   Fmap.indom h loc0 ->
   P h r f (pderef (pval (vloc loc0))) h r f
     (Fmap.read h loc0)) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value) (r : rho)
     (f : futureCond) (loc0 : loc) (v : val),
   Fmap.indom h loc0 ->
   P h r f (passign (pval (vloc loc0)) (pval v))
     (Fmap.update h loc0 v) r f vunit) ->
  (forall (fromal_arg : var) (e : expr)
     (actual_arg : val) (h1 h2 : heap)
     (rho1 rho2 : rho) (f1 f2 : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
     h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2
     rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1
     (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e))
        (pval actual_arg)) h2 rho2 f2 v) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value)
     (r : rho) (f : futureCond) (loc : Logic.loc)
     (v : val) (f' : futureCond),
   ~ Fmap.indom h loc ->
   futureSubtraction_linear f
     (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist f' ->
   P h r f (pref (pval v)) (Fmap.update h loc v)
     (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist)
     (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc))))
     (vloc loc)) ->
  forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
    (e : expr) (h0 : heap) (r0 : rho)
    (f0 : futureCond) (v : val),
  bigstep h r f e h0 r0 f0 v -> P h r f e h0 r0 f0 v
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.update h1 h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
Fmap.union_self:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : Fmap.fmap A B), h \u h = h
union_self:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : fmap A B), h \u h = h
union_empty_l:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : fmap A B), empty \u h = h
Fmap.union_empty_l:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : Fmap.fmap A B),
  Fmap.empty \u h = h
Fmap.union_empty_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : Fmap.fmap A B),
  h \u Fmap.empty = h
union_empty_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : fmap A B), h \u empty = h
indom_union_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : fmap A B] (h2 : fmap A B)
    [x : A], indom h1 x -> indom (h1 \u h2) x
Fmap.indom_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 : Fmap.fmap A B)
    [h2 : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A],
  Fmap.indom h2 x -> Fmap.indom (h1 \u h2) x
Fmap.indom_union_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B]
    (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A],
  Fmap.indom h1 x -> Fmap.indom (h1 \u h2) x
indom_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 : fmap A B) [h2 : fmap A B]
    [x : A], indom h2 x -> indom (h1 \u h2) x
agree_union_rl_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : fmap A B],
  agree f1 (f2 \u f3) -> agree f1 f2
Fmap.agree_union_rl_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.agree f1 (f2 \u f3) -> Fmap.agree f1 f2
Fmap.agree_union_ll_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.agree (f1 \u f2) f3 -> Fmap.agree f1 f3
agree_union_ll_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : fmap A B],
  agree (f1 \u f2) f3 -> agree f1 f3
union_comm_of_disjoint:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 : fmap A B),
  disjoint h1 h2 -> h1 \u h2 = h2 \u h1
Fmap.union_comm_of_disjoint:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 : Fmap.fmap A B),
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 -> h1 \u h2 = h2 \u h1
Fmap.union_comm_of_agree:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 : Fmap.fmap A B),
  Fmap.agree h1 h2 -> h1 \u h2 = h2 \u h1
union_comm_of_agree:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 : fmap A B),
  agree h1 h2 -> h1 \u h2 = h2 \u h1
Fmap.update_eq_union_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : Fmap.fmap A B) (x : A)
    (v : B), Fmap.update h x v = Fmap.single x v \u h
update_eq_union_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : fmap A B) (x : A) (v : B),
  update h x v = single x v \u h
agree_union_rr_inv_agree:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : fmap A B],
  agree f1 (f2 \u f3) -> agree f2 f3 -> agree f1 f3
agree_union_lr_inv_agree_agree:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : fmap A B],
  agree (f1 \u f2) f3 -> agree f1 f2 -> agree f2 f3
Fmap.agree_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.agree f1 f2 ->
  Fmap.agree f1 f3 -> Fmap.agree f1 (f2 \u f3)
Fmap.agree_union_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.agree f1 f3 ->
  Fmap.agree f2 f3 -> Fmap.agree (f1 \u f2) f3
Fmap.agree_union_lr_inv_agree_agree:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.agree (f1 \u f2) f3 ->
  Fmap.agree f1 f2 -> Fmap.agree f2 f3
Fmap.agree_union_rr_inv_agree:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.agree f1 (f2 \u f3) ->
  Fmap.agree f2 f3 -> Fmap.agree f1 f3
agree_union_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : fmap A B],
  agree f1 f3 -> agree f2 f3 -> agree (f1 \u f2) f3
agree_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : fmap A B],
  agree f1 f2 -> agree f1 f3 -> agree f1 (f2 \u f3)
hwand_inv:
  forall [h1 h2 : heap] [H1 H2 : hprop],
  (H1 \-* H2) h2 ->
  H1 h1 -> Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 -> H2 (h1 \u h2)
Fmap.union_eq_empty_inv_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  h1 \u h2 = Fmap.empty -> h1 = Fmap.empty
hstar_intro:
  forall (H1 H2 : hprop) [h1 h2 : heap],
  H1 h1 ->
  H2 h2 ->
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 -> (H1 \* H2) (h1 \u h2)
union_eq_empty_inv_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 : fmap A B],
  h1 \u h2 = empty -> h2 = empty
Fmap.union_eq_empty_inv_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  h1 \u h2 = Fmap.empty -> h2 = Fmap.empty
union_eq_empty_inv_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 : fmap A B],
  h1 \u h2 = empty -> h1 = empty
Fmap.union_eq_cancel_1:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 : Fmap.fmap A B)
    [h2 h2' : Fmap.fmap A B],
  h2 = h2' -> h1 \u h2 = h1 \u h2'
union_eq_cancel_1:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 : fmap A B)
    [h2 h2' : fmap A B],
  h2 = h2' -> h1 \u h2 = h1 \u h2'
union_assoc:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 h3 : fmap A B),
  (h1 \u h2) \u h3 = h1 \u h2 \u h3
Fmap.union_assoc:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 h3 : Fmap.fmap A B),
  (h1 \u h2) \u h3 = h1 \u h2 \u h3
indom_union_eq:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 : fmap A B) (x : A),
  indom (h1 \u h2) x = (indom h1 x \/ indom h2 x)
Fmap.indom_union_eq:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) (x : A),
  Fmap.indom (h1 \u h2) x =
  (Fmap.indom h1 x \/ Fmap.indom h2 x)
heap_disjoint_consequence_aux:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 h3 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 ->
  Fmap.disjoint h2 h3 ->
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h3 -> Fmap.disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3)
Fmap.disjoint_union_eq_l:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 h3 : Fmap.fmap A B),
  Fmap.disjoint (h2 \u h3) h1 =
  (Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3)
Fmap.disjoint_union_eq_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 h3 : Fmap.fmap A B),
  Fmap.disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3) =
  (Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3)
disjoint_union_eq_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 h3 : fmap A B),
  disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3) =
  (disjoint h1 h2 /\ disjoint h1 h3)
disjoint_union_eq_l:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 h2 h3 : fmap A B),
  disjoint (h2 \u h3) h1 =
  (disjoint h1 h2 /\ disjoint h1 h3)
agree_union_l_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : fmap A B],
  agree (f1 \u f2) f3 ->
  agree f1 f2 -> agree f1 f3 /\ agree f2 f3
agree_union_r_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : fmap A B],
  agree f1 (f2 \u f3) ->
  agree f2 f3 -> agree f1 f2 /\ agree f1 f3
Fmap.agree_union_r_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.agree f1 (f2 \u f3) ->
  Fmap.agree f2 f3 ->
  Fmap.agree f1 f2 /\ Fmap.agree f1 f3
Fmap.agree_union_l_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 f2 f3 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.agree (f1 \u f2) f3 ->
  Fmap.agree f1 f2 ->
  Fmap.agree f1 f3 /\ Fmap.agree f2 f3
union_eq_cancel_2':
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h1' h2 : fmap A B],
  disjoint h1 h1' -> h2 = h1' -> h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h1
Fmap.union_eq_cancel_2':
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h1' h2 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h1' ->
  h2 = h1' -> h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h1
remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> remove (single x v \u h) x = h
Fmap.remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.remove (Fmap.single x v \u h) x = h
read_union_l:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B} [h1 : fmap A B]
    (h2 : fmap A B) [x : A],
  indom h1 x -> read (h1 \u h2) x = read h1 x
Fmap.read_union_l:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B}
    [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B] (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A],
  Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.read (h1 \u h2) x = Fmap.read h1 x
conseq_cons:
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  conseq (v :: vs) l = single l v \u conseq vs (S l)
Fmap.conseq_cons:
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  Fmap.conseq (v :: vs) l =
  Fmap.single l v \u Fmap.conseq vs (S l)
Fmap.update_union_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B]
    (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A] (v : B),
  Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.update (h1 \u h2) x v =
  Fmap.update h1 x v \u h2
update_union_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : fmap A B] (h2 : fmap A B)
    [x : A] (v : B),
  indom h1 x ->
  update (h1 \u h2) x v = update h1 x v \u h2
union_eq_inv_of_disjoint:
  forall [A B : Type] [h2 h1 h1' : fmap A B],
  disjoint h1 h2 ->
  disjoint h1' h2 -> h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h2 -> h1 = h1'
agree_union_lr:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 g1 f2 g2 : fmap A B],
  agree g1 g2 ->
  disjoint_3 f1 f2 (g1 \u g2) ->
  agree (f1 \u g1) (f2 \u g2)
Fmap.agree_union_lr:
  forall [A B : Type] [f1 g1 f2 g2 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.agree g1 g2 ->
  Fmap.disjoint_3 f1 f2 (g1 \u g2) ->
  Fmap.agree (f1 \u g1) (f2 \u g2)
read_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B} [h1 : fmap A B]
    (h2 : fmap A B) [x : A],
  ~ indom h1 x -> read (h1 \u h2) x = read h2 x
Fmap.read_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B}
    [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B] (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A],
  ~ Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.read (h1 \u h2) x = Fmap.read h2 x
Fmap.union_eq_inv_of_disjoint:
  forall [A B : Type] [h2 h1 h1' : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 ->
  Fmap.disjoint h1' h2 ->
  h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h2 -> h1 = h1'
update_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : fmap A B] (h2 : fmap A B)
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h1 x ->
  update (h1 \u h2) x v = h1 \u update h2 x v
Fmap.update_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B]
    (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.update (h1 \u h2) x v =
  h1 \u Fmap.update h2 x v
update_union_not_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : fmap A B] (h2 : fmap A B)
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h1 x ->
  update (h1 \u h2) x v = h1 \u update h2 x v
update_union_not_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 : fmap A B) [h2 : fmap A B]
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h2 x ->
  update (h1 \u h2) x v = update h1 x v \u h2
Fmap.update_union_not_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 : Fmap.fmap A B)
    [h2 : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h2 x ->
  Fmap.update (h1 \u h2) x v =
  Fmap.update h1 x v \u h2
Fmap.update_union_not_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B]
    (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.update (h1 \u h2) x v =
  h1 \u Fmap.update h2 x v
Fmap.remove_disjoint_union_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A],
  Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 ->
  Fmap.remove (h1 \u h2) x = Fmap.remove h1 x \u h2
remove_disjoint_union_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 : fmap A B] [x : A],
  indom h1 x ->
  disjoint h1 h2 ->
  remove (h1 \u h2) x = remove h1 x \u h2
Fmap.conseq_cons':
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  Fmap.conseq (v :: vs) l =
  Fmap.single l v \u Fmap.conseq vs (l + 1)
conseq_cons':
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  conseq (v :: vs) l = single l v \u conseq vs (l + 1)
Fmap.union_eq_cancel_2:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h1' h2 h2' : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h1' ->
  h2 = h1' \u h2' -> h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h1 \u h2'
union_eq_cancel_2:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h1' h2 h2' : fmap A B],
  disjoint h1 h1' ->
  h2 = h1' \u h2' -> h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h1 \u h2'
hstar_inv:
  forall [H1 H2 : hprop] [h : heap],
  (H1 \* H2) h ->
  exists h1 h2 : heap,
    H1 h1 /\
    H2 h2 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 /\ h = h1 \u h2
Fmap.union_eq_cancel_3':
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h1' h2 h2' : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.disjoint h1 (h1' \u h2') ->
  h2 = h1' \u h2' -> h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h1
union_eq_cancel_3':
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h1' h2 h2' : fmap A B],
  disjoint h1 (h1' \u h2') ->
  h2 = h1' \u h2' -> h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h1
disjoint_demo:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 : fmap A B],
  h1 = h2 \u h3 ->
  disjoint h2 h3 ->
  disjoint_3 h1 h4 h5 ->
  disjoint_3 h3 h2 h5 /\ disjoint h4 h5
Fmap.disjoint_demo:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  h1 = h2 \u h3 ->
  Fmap.disjoint h2 h3 ->
  Fmap.disjoint_3 h1 h4 h5 ->
  Fmap.disjoint_3 h3 h2 h5 /\ Fmap.disjoint h4 h5
Fmap.union_eq_cancel_3:
  forall [A B : Type]
    [h1 h1' h2 h2' h3' : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.disjoint h1 (h1' \u h2') ->
  h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h3' ->
  h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h1 \u h3'
union_eq_cancel_3:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h1' h2 h2' h3' : fmap A B],
  disjoint h1 (h1' \u h2') ->
  h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h3' ->
  h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h1 \u h3'
union_eq_cancel_4':
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h1' h2 h2' h3' : fmap A B],
  disjoint h1 (h1' \u h2' \u h3') ->
  h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h3' ->
  h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h3' \u h1
Fmap.union_eq_cancel_4':
  forall [A B : Type]
    [h1 h1' h2 h2' h3' : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.disjoint h1 (h1' \u h2' \u h3') ->
  h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h3' ->
  h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h3' \u h1
fmap_eq_demo:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 : fmap A B],
  disjoint_3 h1 h2 h3 ->
  disjoint_3 (h1 \u h2 \u h3) h4 h5 ->
  h1 = h2 \u h3 ->
  h4 \u h1 \u h5 = h2 \u h5 \u h4 \u h3
Fmap.fmap_eq_demo:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.disjoint_3 h1 h2 h3 ->
  Fmap.disjoint_3 (h1 \u h2 \u h3) h4 h5 ->
  h1 = h2 \u h3 ->
  h4 \u h1 \u h5 = h2 \u h5 \u h4 \u h3
union_eq_cancel_4:
  forall [A B : Type]
    [h1 h1' h2 h2' h3' h4' : fmap A B],
  disjoint h1 ((h1' \u h2') \u h3') ->
  h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h3' \u h4' ->
  h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h3' \u h1 \u h4'
Fmap.union_eq_cancel_4:
  forall [A B : Type]
    [h1 h1' h2 h2' h3' h4' : Fmap.fmap A B],
  Fmap.disjoint h1 ((h1' \u h2') \u h3') ->
  h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h3' \u h4' ->
  h1 \u h2 = h1' \u h2' \u h3' \u h1 \u h4'
(use "About" for full details on the implicit
 arguments of Fmap.agree_union_lr, agree_union_lr,
 agree_union_r, agree_union_l,
 Fmap.agree_union_rr_inv_agree,
 Fmap.agree_union_lr_inv_agree_agree,
 Fmap.agree_union_l, Fmap.agree_union_r,
 agree_union_lr_inv_agree_agree,
 agree_union_rr_inv_agree, agree_union_ll_inv,
 Fmap.agree_union_ll_inv, Fmap.agree_union_rl_inv and
 agree_union_rl_inv)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: forall (A B : Type) (h1 h2 : Fmap.fmap A B),
Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 -> h1 \u h2 = h2 \u h1
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1 ->
Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
fmap_indom_empty:
  forall (A B : Type) (k : A), ~ indom empty k
fmap_not_indom_of_neq:
  forall (A B : Type) (a b : A) (v : B),
  a <> b -> ~ Fmap.indom (Fmap.single a v) b
Fmap.disjoint_single_of_not_indom:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x v) h
disjoint_single_of_not_indom:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> disjoint (single x v) h
fmap_disjoint_indom:
  forall (A B : Type) (h1 h2 : fmap A B) (x : A),
  disjoint h1 h2 -> indom h1 x -> ~ indom h2 x
Fmap.exists_fresh:
  forall [B : Type] (null : nat) (h : Fmap.fmap nat B),
  exists l : nat, ~ Fmap.indom h l /\ l <> null
exists_fresh:
  forall [B : Type] (null : nat) (h : fmap nat B),
  exists l : nat, ~ indom h l /\ l <> null
Fmap.disjoint_update_not_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 ->
  ~ Fmap.indom h2 x ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.update h1 x v) h2
disjoint_update_not_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 h2 : fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  disjoint h1 h2 ->
  ~ indom h2 x -> disjoint (update h1 x v) h2
Fmap.remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.remove (Fmap.single x v \u h) x = h
remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> remove (single x v \u h) x = h
Fmap.read_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B}
    [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B] (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A],
  ~ Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.read (h1 \u h2) x = Fmap.read h2 x
read_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B} [h1 : fmap A B]
    (h2 : fmap A B) [x : A],
  ~ indom h1 x -> read (h1 \u h2) x = read h2 x
update_union_not_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : fmap A B] (h2 : fmap A B)
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h1 x ->
  update (h1 \u h2) x v = h1 \u update h2 x v
Fmap.update_union_not_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 : Fmap.fmap A B)
    [h2 : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h2 x ->
  Fmap.update (h1 \u h2) x v =
  Fmap.update h1 x v \u h2
update_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : fmap A B] (h2 : fmap A B)
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h1 x ->
  update (h1 \u h2) x v = h1 \u update h2 x v
update_union_not_r:
  forall [A B : Type] (h1 : fmap A B) [h2 : fmap A B]
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h2 x ->
  update (h1 \u h2) x v = update h1 x v \u h2
Fmap.update_union_r:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B]
    (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.update (h1 \u h2) x v =
  h1 \u Fmap.update h2 x v
Fmap.update_union_not_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h1 : Fmap.fmap A B]
    (h2 : Fmap.fmap A B) [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h1 x ->
  Fmap.update (h1 \u h2) x v =
  h1 \u Fmap.update h2 x v
eval_malloc:
  forall [h : Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value] (r : rho)
    [f : futureCond] [loc : Logic.loc] (v : val)
    [f' : futureCond],
  ~ Fmap.indom h loc ->
  futureSubtraction_linear f
    (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist f' ->
  bigstep h r f (pref (pval v)) (Fmap.update h loc v)
    (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist)
    (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc))))
    (vloc loc)
bigstep_ind:
  forall
    P : heap ->
        rho ->
        futureCond ->
        expr ->
        heap -> rho -> futureCond -> val -> Prop,
  (forall (h1 h2 h3 : heap) (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr)
     (v r : val) (rho1 rho2 rho3 : rho)
     (f1 f2 f3 : futureCond),
   bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r ->
   P h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3 rho3 f3 r) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (v : val), P h r f (pval v) h r f v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (e1 e2 : expr) (h' : heap) (r' : rho)
     (f' : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h r f e1 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f e1 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f (pif (pval (vbool true)) e1 e2) h' r' f' v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (e1 e2 : expr) (h' : heap) (r' : rho)
     (f' : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h r f e2 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f e2 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f (pif (pval (vbool false)) e1 e2) h' r' f' v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho)
     (f f_assume : futureCond),
   P h r f (passume f_assume) h r (fc_conj f f_assume)
     vunit) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (ev : event) (f' : futureCond),
   futureSubtraction_linear f (ev :: nil)%mylist f' ->
   P h r f (pevent ev) h (r ++ (ev :: nil)%mylist) f'
     vunit) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value) (r : rho)
     (f : futureCond) (loc0 : loc),
   Fmap.indom h loc0 ->
   P h r f (pderef (pval (vloc loc0))) h r f
     (Fmap.read h loc0)) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value) (r : rho)
     (f : futureCond) (loc0 : loc) (v : val),
   Fmap.indom h loc0 ->
   P h r f (passign (pval (vloc loc0)) (pval v))
     (Fmap.update h loc0 v) r f vunit) ->
  (forall (fromal_arg : var) (e : expr)
     (actual_arg : val) (h1 h2 : heap)
     (rho1 rho2 : rho) (f1 f2 : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
     h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2
     rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1
     (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e))
        (pval actual_arg)) h2 rho2 f2 v) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value)
     (r : rho) (f : futureCond) (loc : Logic.loc)
     (v : val) (f' : futureCond),
   ~ Fmap.indom h loc ->
   futureSubtraction_linear f
     (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist f' ->
   P h r f (pref (pval v)) (Fmap.update h loc v)
     (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist)
     (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc))))
     (vloc loc)) ->
  forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
    (e : expr) (h0 : heap) (r0 : rho)
    (f0 : futureCond) (v : val),
  bigstep h r f e h0 r0 f0 v -> P h r f e h0 r0 f0 v
bigstep_sind:
  forall
    P : heap ->
        rho ->
        futureCond ->
        expr ->
        heap -> rho -> futureCond -> val -> SProp,
  (forall (h1 h2 h3 : heap) (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr)
     (v r : val) (rho1 rho2 rho3 : rho)
     (f1 f2 f3 : futureCond),
   bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r ->
   P h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3 rho3 f3 r) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (v : val), P h r f (pval v) h r f v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (e1 e2 : expr) (h' : heap) (r' : rho)
     (f' : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h r f e1 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f e1 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f (pif (pval (vbool true)) e1 e2) h' r' f' v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (e1 e2 : expr) (h' : heap) (r' : rho)
     (f' : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h r f e2 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f e2 h' r' f' v ->
   P h r f (pif (pval (vbool false)) e1 e2) h' r' f' v) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho)
     (f f_assume : futureCond),
   P h r f (passume f_assume) h r (fc_conj f f_assume)
     vunit) ->
  (forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
     (ev : event) (f' : futureCond),
   futureSubtraction_linear f (ev :: nil)%mylist f' ->
   P h r f (pevent ev) h (r ++ (ev :: nil)%mylist) f'
     vunit) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value) (r : rho)
     (f : futureCond) (loc0 : loc),
   Fmap.indom h loc0 ->
   P h r f (pderef (pval (vloc loc0))) h r f
     (Fmap.read h loc0)) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value) (r : rho)
     (f : futureCond) (loc0 : loc) (v : val),
   Fmap.indom h loc0 ->
   P h r f (passign (pval (vloc loc0)) (pval v))
     (Fmap.update h loc0 v) r f vunit) ->
  (forall (fromal_arg : var) (e : expr)
     (actual_arg : val) (h1 h2 : heap)
     (rho1 rho2 : rho) (f1 f2 : futureCond) (v : val),
   bigstep h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
     h2 rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2
     rho2 f2 v ->
   P h1 rho1 f1
     (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e))
        (pval actual_arg)) h2 rho2 f2 v) ->
  (forall (h : Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value)
     (r : rho) (f : futureCond) (loc : Logic.loc)
     (v : val) (f' : futureCond),
   ~ Fmap.indom h loc ->
   futureSubtraction_linear f
     (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist f' ->
   P h r f (pref (pval v)) (Fmap.update h loc v)
     (r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc) :: nil)%mylist)
     (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc))))
     (vloc loc)) ->
  forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f : futureCond)
    (e : expr) (h0 : heap) (r0 : rho)
    (f0 : futureCond) (v : val),
  bigstep h r f e h0 r0 f0 v -> P h r f e h0 r0 f0 v
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1 ->
Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1 ->
Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: forall (A B : Type) (h : Fmap.fmap A B) 
  (x : A) (v : B),
~ Fmap.indom h x ->
Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x v) h
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1 ->
Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
hstar_comm: forall H1 H2 : hprop, H1 \* H2 = H2 \* H1
hstars_pick_last_2:
  forall H1 H2 : hprop, H1 \* H2 = H2 \* H1
hstars_pick_1: forall H1 H : hprop, H1 \* H = H1 \* H
hstars_flip_1:
  forall H1 : hprop, H1 \* \[] = H1 \* \[]
hstars_pick_2:
  forall H1 H2 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H = H2 \* H1 \* H
hstar_assoc:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  (H1 \* H2) \* H3 = H1 \* H2 \* H3
hstar_comm_assoc:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 = H2 \* H1 \* H3
hstars_pick_last_3:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 = H3 \* H1 \* H2
hstars_flip_2:
  forall H1 H2 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* \[] = H2 \* H1 \* \[]
hstars_pick_3:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H = H3 \* H1 \* H2 \* H
hstars_pick_last_4:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 = H4 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3
hstars_flip_3:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* \[] = H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
hstars_pick_4:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H =
  H4 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H
hstars_pick_last_5:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 =
  H5 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4
hstars_flip_4:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* \[] =
  H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
hstars_pick_5:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H =
  H5 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H
hstars_pick_last_6:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 =
  H6 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5
hstars_flip_5:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* \[] =
  H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
hstars_pick_6:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H =
  H6 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H
hstars_pick_last_7:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 =
  H7 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6
hstars_flip_6:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* \[] =
  H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
hstars_pick_7:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H =
  H7 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H
hstars_pick_last_8:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 =
  H8 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7
hstars_flip_7:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* \[] =
  H7 \* H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
hstars_pick_last_9:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H9 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H9 =
  H9 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8
hstars_pick_8:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H =
  H8 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H
hstars_flip_8:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* \[] =
  H8 \* H7 \* H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
hstars_pick_9:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H9 H : hprop,
  H1 \*
  H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H9 \* H =
  H9 \*
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H
hstars_flip_9:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H9 : hprop,
  H1 \*
  H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H9 \* \[] =
  H9 \*
  H8 \* H7 \* H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
((h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h]) \* P)
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
(h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h]) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
Fmap.indom_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.indom (Fmap.single x v) x
indom_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  indom (single x v) x
hsingle_intro:
  forall (p : loc) (v : Val.value),
  (p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)
Fmap.disjoint_single_single_same_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [x : A] [v1 v2 : B],
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x v1) (Fmap.single x v2) ->
  False
disjoint_single_single_same_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [x : A] [v1 v2 : B],
  disjoint (single x v1) (single x v2) -> False
Fmap.indom_single_eq:
  forall [A B : Type] (x y : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.indom (Fmap.single x v) y = (x = y)
indom_single_eq:
  forall [A B : Type] (x y : A) (v : B),
  indom (single x v) y = (x = y)
Fmap.read_single:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B} (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.read (Fmap.single x v) x = v
hsingle_inv:
  forall [p : loc] [v : Val.value] [h : heap],
  (p ~~> v) h -> h = Fmap.single p v
read_single:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B} (x : A) (v : B),
  read (single x v) x = v
fmap_not_indom_of_neq:
  forall (A B : Type) (a b : A) (v : B),
  a <> b -> ~ Fmap.indom (Fmap.single a v) b
Fmap.remove_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.remove (Fmap.single x v) x = Fmap.empty
remove_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  remove (single x v) x = empty
Fmap.update_empty:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.update Fmap.empty x v = Fmap.single x v
update_empty:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  update empty x v = single x v
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
Fmap.update_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v w : B),
  Fmap.update (Fmap.single x v) x w = Fmap.single x w
update_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v w : B),
  update (single x v) x w = single x w
Fmap.disjoint_single_set:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [l : A]
    [v1 : B] (v2 : B),
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v1) h ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v2) h
disjoint_single_set:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [l : A] [v1 : B]
    (v2 : B),
  disjoint (single l v1) h -> disjoint (single l v2) h
Fmap.disjoint_single_single:
  forall [A B : Type] [x1 x2 : A] (v1 v2 : B),
  x1 <> x2 ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x1 v1)
    (Fmap.single x2 v2)
disjoint_single_of_not_indom:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> disjoint (single x v) h
disjoint_single_single:
  forall [A B : Type] [x1 x2 : A] (v1 v2 : B),
  x1 <> x2 -> disjoint (single x1 v1) (single x2 v2)
Fmap.disjoint_single_of_not_indom:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x v) h
Fmap.update_eq_union_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : Fmap.fmap A B) (x : A)
    (v : B), Fmap.update h x v = Fmap.single x v \u h
update_eq_union_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : fmap A B) (x : A) (v : B),
  update h x v = single x v \u h
Fmap.single_fresh:
  forall [B : Type] (null : nat) (h : Fmap.fmap nat B)
    (v : B),
  exists l : nat,
    Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v) h /\ l <> null
single_fresh:
  forall [B : Type] (null : nat) (h : fmap nat B)
    (v : B),
  exists l : nat, disjoint (single l v) h /\ l <> null
remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> remove (single x v \u h) x = h
Fmap.remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] [x : A]
    (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.remove (Fmap.single x v \u h) x = h
conseq_cons:
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  conseq (v :: vs) l = single l v \u conseq vs (S l)
Fmap.conseq_cons:
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  Fmap.conseq (v :: vs) l =
  Fmap.single l v \u Fmap.conseq vs (S l)
Fmap.disjoint_single_conseq:
  forall [B : Type] [l l' : nat] (L : list B) (v : B),
  (l < l')%nat \/ (l >= l' + length L)%nat ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v) (Fmap.conseq L l')
disjoint_single_conseq:
  forall [B : Type] [l l' : nat] (L : list B) (v : B),
  (l < l')%nat \/ (l >= l' + length L)%nat ->
  disjoint (single l v) (conseq L l')
Fmap.conseq_cons':
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  Fmap.conseq (v :: vs) l =
  Fmap.single l v \u Fmap.conseq vs (l + 1)
conseq_cons':
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  conseq (v :: vs) l = single l v \u conseq vs (l + 1)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
(h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h]) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: forall (p : loc) (v : Val.value),
(p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)
(h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h]) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
