H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
(h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h]) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
hstar_hgc_hgc: \GC \* \GC = \GC
hstar_htop_htop: \Top \* \Top = \Top
hstar_hempty_l: forall H : hprop, \[] \* H = H
hstar_hempty_r: forall H : hprop, H \* \[] = H
hstars_pick_1: forall H1 H : hprop, H1 \* H = H1 \* H
hstar_comm: forall H1 H2 : hprop, H1 \* H2 = H2 \* H1
hstars_pick_last_2:
  forall H1 H2 : hprop, H1 \* H2 = H2 \* H1
hstars_flip_1:
  forall H1 : hprop, H1 \* \[] = H1 \* \[]
hwand_cancel:
  forall H1 H2 : hprop, H1 \* (H1 \-* H2) ==> H2
hfalse_hstar_any:
  forall H : hprop, \[False] \* H = \[False]
himpl_frame_r:
  forall [H1 H2 H2' : hprop],
  H2 ==> H2' -> H1 \* H2 ==> H1 \* H2'
himpl_frame_l:
  forall [H2 H1 H1' : hprop],
  H1 ==> H1' -> H1 \* H2 ==> H1' \* H2
hstars_pick_2:
  forall H1 H2 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H = H2 \* H1 \* H
hstar_comm_assoc:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 = H2 \* H1 \* H3
hstar_assoc:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  (H1 \* H2) \* H3 = H1 \* H2 \* H3
hstars_pick_last_3:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 = H3 \* H1 \* H2
star_post_empty:
  forall [B : Type] (Q : B -> hprop), Q \*+ \[] = Q
himpl_hwand_r_inv:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 : hprop],
  H1 ==> H2 \-* H3 -> H2 \* H1 ==> H3
himpl_hwand_r:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 : hprop],
  H2 \* H1 ==> H3 -> H1 ==> H2 \-* H3
hstars_flip_2:
  forall H1 H2 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* \[] = H2 \* H1 \* \[]
hwand_uncurry:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 : hprop],
  H1 \-* H2 \-* H3 ==> H1 \* H2 \-* H3
xsimpl_demo_hwand_r:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 ==> H1 \* (H3 \-* H2 \* H3)
himpl_hstar_hpure_r:
  forall [P : Prop] [H H' : hprop],
  P -> H ==> H' -> H ==> \[P] \* H'
hwand_curry:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 : hprop],
  H1 \* H2 \-* H3 ==> H1 \-* H2 \-* H3
hstars_simpl_start:
  forall [H1 H2 : hprop],
  H1 \* \[] ==> \[] \* H2 \* \[] -> H1 ==> H2
himpl_hstar_hpure_l:
  forall [P : Prop] [H H' : hprop],
  (P -> H ==> H') -> \[P] \* H ==> H'
xsimpl_demo_hfalse:
  forall [H1 : hprop] (H2 : hprop),
  H1 ==> \[False] -> H1 \* H2 ==> \[False]
hwand_curry_eq:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \-* H3 = H1 \-* H2 \-* H3
hstar_hpure_conj:
  forall H1 H2 : Prop, \[H1] \* \[H2] = \[H1 /\ H2]
himpl_hstar_trans_r:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop],
  H1 ==> H2 -> H3 \* H2 ==> H4 -> H3 \* H1 ==> H4
himpl_hstar_trans_l:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop],
  H1 ==> H2 -> H2 \* H3 ==> H4 -> H1 \* H3 ==> H4
himpl_frame_lr:
  forall [H1 H1' H2 H2' : hprop],
  H1 ==> H1' -> H2 ==> H2' -> H1 \* H2 ==> H1' \* H2'
HS.himpl_hstar_trans_l:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop],
  H1 ==> H2 -> H2 \* H3 ==> H4 -> H1 \* H3 ==> H4
hwand_equiv:
  forall H0 H1 H2 : hprop,
  H0 ==> H1 \-* H2 <-> H1 \* H0 ==> H2
hstars_simpl_keep:
  forall [H1 Ha H Ht : hprop],
  H1 ==> (H \* Ha) \* Ht -> H1 ==> Ha \* H \* Ht
hstars_simpl_cancel:
  forall [H1 Ha : hprop] (H : hprop) [Ht : hprop],
  H1 ==> Ha \* Ht -> H \* H1 ==> Ha \* H \* Ht
qwand_cancel:
  forall [A : Type] [Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop],
  Q1 \*+ (Q1 \--* Q2) ===> Q2
xsimpl_demo_hgc_multiple:
  forall (H1 : hprop) [H2 : hprop],
  haffine H2 -> H1 \* H2 \* \GC ==> H1 \* \GC \* \GC
hstar_hpure_l:
  forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) (h : heap),
  (\[P] \* H) h = (P /\ H h)
hstars_pick_3:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H = H3 \* H1 \* H2 \* H
hstar_hforall:
  forall [H : hprop] [A : Type] [J : A -> hprop],
  (\forall xn, J xn) \* H ==> \forall x : A, J x \* H
hstar_hpure_r:
  forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) (h : heap),
  (H \* \[P]) h = (H h /\ P)
hstars_pick_last_4:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 = H4 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3
hstar_hexists:
  forall [A : Type] (J : A -> hprop) (H : hprop),
  (\exists xn, J xn) \* H = \exists x : A, J x \* H
hstars_flip_3:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* \[] = H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
xsimpl_demo_hwand:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop,
  (H1 \-* H2 \-* H3) \* H1 \* H4 ==> H2 \-* H3 \* H4
hstar_hsingle_same_loc:
  forall (p : loc) (w1 w2 : Val.value),
  p ~~> w1 \* p ~~> w2 ==> \[False]
xchange_demo_1:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 : hprop] (H4 H5 H6 : hprop),
  H1 ==> H2 \* H3 -> H1 \* H4 ==> H5 \-* H6
xchange_lemma:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop],
  H1 ==> H2 ->
  H3 ==> H1 \* (H2 \-* protect H4) -> H3 ==> H4
xchange_demo_4:
  forall [A : Type] [Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop] (H : hprop),
  Q1 ===> Q2 -> Q1 \*+ H ===> Q2 \*+ H
demo_hstars_simpl_1:
  forall (H1 : hprop) [H2 : hprop] (H3 H4 : hprop)
    [H5 : hprop],
  H2 ==> H5 ->
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 ==> H4 \* H5 \* H3 \* H1
demo_hstars_pick_1:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 H4 Hresult : hprop],
  (forall H : hprop,
   H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 = H -> H = Hresult -> True) ->
  True
hstars_pick_4:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H =
  H4 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H
hstars_pick_last_5:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 =
  H5 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4
himpl_qwand_r:
  forall [A : Type] (Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop) (H : hprop),
  Q1 \*+ H ===> Q2 -> H ==> Q1 \--* Q2
xsimpl_demo_hwand_multiple_1:
  forall [H1 : hprop] (H2 H3 : hprop) [H4 H5 : hprop],
  H1 \-* H4 ==> H5 ->
  (H2 \* (H1 \* H2 \* H3 \-* H4)) \* H3 ==> H5
xsimpl_demo_qwand_r:
  forall [A : Type],
  A ->
  forall Q1 : A -> hprop,
  (A -> hprop) ->
  forall H1 H2 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 ==> H1 \* (Q1 \--* Q1 \*+ H2)
hstars_flip_4:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* \[] =
  H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
xsimpl_demo_qwand:
  forall [A : Type] (x : A) (Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop)
    (H1 : hprop),
  H1 \* (H1 \-* Q1 \--* Q2) \* Q1 x ==> Q2 x
xsimpl_demo_hwand_iter:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* (H1 \* H3 \-* H4 \-* H5) \* H4 ==>
  (H2 \-* H3) \-* H5
xsimpl_demo_hwand_multiple_2:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 : hprop,
  (H1 \* H2 \* (H1 \* H3 \-* H4 \-* H5)) \*
  (H2 \-* H3) \* H4 ==> H5
qwand_equiv:
  forall (H : hprop) [A : Type] (Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop),
  H ==> Q1 \--* Q2 <-> Q1 \*+ H ===> Q2
fw_val:
  forall (v : val) (P : hprop),
  forward P emp fc_default (pval v)
    (fun res : val => P \* \[res = v]) emp fc_default
hstar_intro:
  forall (H1 H2 : hprop) [h1 h2 : heap],
  H1 h1 ->
  H2 h2 ->
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 -> (H1 \* H2) (h1 \u h2)
hstars_pick_last_6:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 =
  H6 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5
hstars_pick_5:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H =
  H5 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H
hstars_flip_5:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* \[] =
  H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
fw_assume:
  forall (P : hprop) (f1 : futureCond),
  forward P emp fc_default (passume f1)
    (fun res : val => P \* \[res = vunit]) emp f1
xchange_demo_2:
  forall [A : Type] (Q : A -> hprop)
    [H1 H2 H3 : hprop],
  H1 ==> \exists x : A, Q x \* (H2 \-* H3) ->
  H1 \* H2 ==> \exists x : A, Q x \* H3
hstars_pick_last_7:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 =
  H7 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6
hstars_pick_6:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H =
  H6 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H
fw_event:
  forall (P : hprop) (ev : event),
  forward P emp fc_default (pevent ev)
    (fun res : val => P \* \[res = vunit])
    (theta_singleton ev) fc_default
xsimpl_lr_exit:
  forall [Hla Hra Hrg : hprop],
  Hla ==> Hra \* Hrg ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[]) (Hra, Hrg, \[])
hstars_flip_6:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* \[] =
  H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
xsimpl_start:
  forall [H1 H2 : hprop],
  Xsimpl (\[], \[], H1 \* \[]) (\[], \[], H2 \* \[]) ->
  H1 ==> H2
xsimpl_lr_hwand_hfalse:
  forall Hla H1 : hprop,
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((\[False] \-* H1) \* \[], \[], \[])
xsimpl_r_hgc_drop:
  forall (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, \GC \* Hrt)
xsimpl_r_htop_drop:
  forall (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, \Top \* Hrt)
xsimpl_r_hempty:
  forall (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, \[] \* Hrt)
xsimpl_l_hempty:
  forall (Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, \[] \* Hlt) HR
hstars_pick_last_8:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 =
  H8 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7
xsimpl_l_keep_wand:
  forall (H Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (H \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, H \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
xsimpl_r_hgc_or_htop:
  forall (H Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, H \* Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, H \* Hrt)
hstars_pick_7:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H =
  H7 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H
xsimpl_l_acc_wand:
  forall (H Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, H \* Hlw, Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, H \* Hlt) HR
xsimpl_l_acc_other:
  forall (H Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (H \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, H \* Hlt) HR
xsimpl_r_keep:
  forall (H Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (H \* Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, H \* Hrt)
hstars_flip_7:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* \[] =
  H7 \* H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
himpl_lr_qwand_unify:
  forall [A : Type] (Q : A -> hprop) (Hla : hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((Q \--* Q \*+ Hla) \* \[], \[], \[])
xchange_demo_hforall_l:
  (forall (A : Type) (x : A) (J : A -> hprop),
   \forall xn, J xn ==> J x) ->
  forall (Q : int -> hprop) (H1 : hprop),
  (\forall x : int, Q x) \* H1 ==> Q 2 \* \Top
fw_deref:
  forall (loc : loc) (v : Val.value),
  forward (loc ~~> v) emp fc_default
    (pderef (pval (vloc loc)))
    (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = v]) emp
    fc_default
xsimpl_r_hwand_same:
  forall (H Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, (H \-* H) \* Hrt)
xsimpl_l_hpure:
  forall [P : Prop] (Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  (P -> Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) HR) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, \[P] \* Hlt) HR
xsimpl_r_hpure:
  forall [P : Prop] (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  P ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, \[P] \* Hrt)
xsimpl_demo_hint:
  forall (H1 : hprop) (Q : int -> hprop),
  Q 4 ==> Q 3 ->
  H1 \* Q 4 ==> \exists x : int, Q x \* H1
xsimpl_r_htop_replace_hgc:
  forall (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, \Top \* Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, \GC \* Hrg, \Top \* Hrt)
hstar_inv:
  forall [H1 H2 : hprop] [h : heap],
  (H1 \* H2) h ->
  exists h1 h2 : heap,
    H1 h1 /\
    H2 h2 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 /\ h = h1 \u h2
hstars_pick_last_9:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H9 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H9 =
  H9 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8
hstars_pick_8:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H =
  H8 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H
hstars_flip_8:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* \[] =
  H8 \* H7 \* H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
xsimpl_l_cancel_hwand_hempty:
  forall (H2 Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, H2 \* Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, (\[] \-* H2) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
fw_assign:
  forall (loc : loc) (v : val) (v' : Val.value),
  forward (loc ~~> v') emp fc_default
    (passign (pval (vloc loc)) (pval v))
    (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = vunit]) emp
    fc_default
xsimpl_r_id_unify:
  forall [A : Type] (x : A) (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, repr (Id x) x \* Hrt)
xsimpl_l_hexists:
  forall [A : Type] (J : A -> hprop)
    (Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop) (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  (forall x : A, Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, J x \* Hlt) HR) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, (\exists xn, J xn) \* Hlt) HR
xsimpl_r_hexists:
  forall [A : Type] (x : A) (J : A -> hprop)
    (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop) (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, J x \* Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, (\exists xn, J xn) \* Hrt)
hstars_pick_9:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H9 H : hprop,
  H1 \*
  H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H9 \* H =
  H9 \*
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H
xsimpl_l_cancel_hwand_hstar_hempty:
  forall (H2 H3 Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, (H2 \-* H3) \* Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, (\[] \* H2 \-* H3) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
xsimpl_l_cancel_hwand:
  forall (H1 H2 Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (\[], Hlw, Hla \* H2 \* Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (H1 \* Hla, (H1 \-* H2) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
hstars_flip_9:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H9 : hprop,
  H1 \*
  H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H9 \* \[] =
  H9 \*
  H8 \* H7 \* H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
himpl_lr_htop:
  forall (Hla : hprop) [Hrg : hprop],
  Xsimpl (\[], \[], \[]) (\[], Hrg, \[]) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[]) (\[], \Top \* Hrg, \[])
Xsimpl_trans_l:
  forall [Hla1 Hlw1 Hlt1 Hla2 Hlw2 Hlt2 : hprop]
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla2, Hlw2, Hlt2) HR ->
  Hla1 \* Hlw1 \* Hlt1 ==> Hla2 \* Hlw2 \* Hlt2 ->
  Xsimpl (Hla1, Hlw1, Hlt1) HR
Xsimpl_trans_r:
  forall [Hra1 Hrg1 Hrt1 Hra2 Hrg2 Hrt2 : hprop]
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra2, Hrg2, Hrt2) ->
  Hra2 \* Hrg2 \* Hrt2 ==> Hra1 \* Hrg1 \* Hrt1 ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra1, Hrg1, Hrt1)
xsimpl_l_cancel_hwand_hstar:
  forall (H1 H2 H3 Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, (H2 \-* H3) \* Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (H1 \* Hla, (H1 \* H2 \-* H3) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
xsimpl_l_hwand_reorder:
  forall [H1 H1' : hprop] (H2 Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  H1 = H1' ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, (H1' \-* H2) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, (H1 \-* H2) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
xsimpl_demo_repr_1:
  forall (p q : int) (R : int -> int -> hprop),
  repr (R 3) p \* repr (R 4) q ==>
  \exists n m : int, repr (R n) p \* repr (R m) q
xsimpl_r_id:
  forall [A : Type] [x X : A] (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  X = x ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, repr (Id X) x \* Hrt)
himpl_lr_hgc:
  forall [Hla Hrg : hprop],
  haffine Hla ->
  Xsimpl (\[], \[], \[]) (\[], Hrg, \[]) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[]) (\[], \GC \* Hrg, \[])
xsimpl_lr_cancel_same:
  forall (H : hprop) [Hla Hlw Hlt Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop],
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl (H \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, Hrg, H \* Hrt)
xsimpl_lr_cancel_hgc:
  forall [Hla Hlw Hlt Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop],
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, \GC \* Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl (\GC \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, \GC \* Hrg, Hrt)
xsimpl_lr_hwand:
  forall [H1 H2 Hla : hprop],
  Xsimpl (\[], \[], H1 \* Hla) (\[], \[], H2 \* \[]) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((H1 \-* H2) \* \[], \[], \[])
xsimpl_l_cancel_qwand:
  forall [A : Type] (x : A) (Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop)
    (Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop) (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (\[], Hlw, Hla \* Q2 x \* Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Q1 x \* Hla, (Q1 \--* Q2) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
xsimpl_lr_cancel_htop:
  forall (H : hprop) [Hla Hlw Hlt Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop],
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, \Top \* Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl (H \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, \Top \* Hrg, Hrt)
xsimpl_lr_hforall:
  forall [A : Type] (J : A -> hprop) [Hla : hprop],
  (forall x : A,
   Xsimpl (\[], \[], Hla) (\[], \[], J x \* \[])) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((\forall xn, J xn) \* \[], \[], \[])
xsimpl_lr_cancel_eq:
  forall [H1 H2 Hla Hlw Hlt Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop],
  H1 = H2 ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl (H1 \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, Hrg, H2 \* Hrt)
xsimpl_lr_qwand:
  forall [A : Type] (Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop) [Hla : hprop],
  (forall x : A,
   Xsimpl (\[], \[], Q1 x \* Hla)
     (\[], \[], Q2 x \* \[])) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((Q1 \--* Q2) \* \[], \[], \[])
xsimpl_lr_qwand_unit:
  forall (Q1 Q2 : unit -> hprop) [Hla : hprop],
  Xsimpl (\[], \[], Q1 tt \* Hla)
    (\[], \[], Q2 tt \* \[]) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((Q1 \--* Q2) \* \[], \[], \[])
xsimpl_lr_cancel_eq_repr:
  forall [A : Type] (p : A) [E1 E2 : A -> hprop]
    [Hla Hlw Hlt Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop],
  E1 = E2 ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl (repr E1 p \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt)
    (Hra, Hrg, repr E2 p \* Hrt)
Xsimpl_trans:
  forall
    [Hla1 Hlw1 Hlt1 Hla2 Hlw2 Hlt2 Hra1 Hrg1 Hrt1 Hra2
     Hrg2 Hrt2 : hprop],
  Xsimpl (Hla2, Hlw2, Hlt2) (Hra2, Hrg2, Hrt2) ->
  (Hla2 \* Hlw2 \* Hlt2 ==> Hra2 \* Hrg2 \* Hrt2 ->
   Hla1 \* Hlw1 \* Hlt1 ==> Hra1 \* Hrg1 \* Hrt1) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla1, Hlw1, Hlt1) (Hra1, Hrg1, Hrt1)
fw_malloc:
  forall (P : hprop) (v : val) (h : loc),
  forward P emp fc_default (pref (pval v))
    (fun res : val => P \* h ~~> v \* \[res = vloc h])
    (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h)))
    (fc_singleton
       (seq trace_default
          (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
forward_sind:
  forall
    P : hprop ->
        theta ->
        futureCond ->
        expr ->
        (val -> hprop) -> theta -> futureCond -> SProp,
  (forall (P1 : hprop) (P2 : val -> hprop)
     (P3 : hprop) (P4 : val -> hprop) (t' : theta)
     (f' : futureCond) (t : theta) (f : futureCond)
     (e : expr),
   forward P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f' ->
   P P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f' ->
   P1 ==> P3 ->
   P4 ===> P2 ->
   inclusion t' t ->
   futureCondEntail f f' ->
   P P1 emp fc_default e P2 t f) ->
  (forall (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr) (P0 : hprop)
     (Q Q1 : val -> hprop) (t2 t3 : theta)
     (f2 f3 : futureCond),
   forward P0 emp fc_default e1 Q t2 f2 ->
   P P0 emp fc_default e1 Q t2 f2 ->
   (forall v : val,
    forward (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
   (forall v : val,
    P (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (plet x e1 e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
  (forall (v : val) (P0 : hprop),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pval v)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = v]) emp
     fc_default) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (ev : event),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pevent ev)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = vunit])
     (theta_singleton ev) fc_default) ->
  (forall (b : bool) (e1 e2 : expr) (t : theta)
     (f : futureCond) (P0 : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop),
   forward P0 emp fc_default (if b then e1 else e2) Q
     t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (if b then e1 else e2) Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (pif (pval (vbool b)) e1 e2) Q
     t f) ->
  (forall (loc : loc) (v : Val.value),
   P (loc ~~> v) emp fc_default
     (pderef (pval (vloc loc)))
     (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = v]) emp
     fc_default) ->
  (forall (loc : loc) (v : val) (v' : Val.value),
   P (loc ~~> v') emp fc_default
     (passign (pval (vloc loc)) (pval v))
     (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = vunit])
     emp fc_default) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (f1 : futureCond),
   P P0 emp fc_default (passume f1)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = vunit]) emp f1) ->
  (forall (fromal_arg : var) (e : expr)
     (actual_arg : val) (P0 : hprop)
     (Q : val -> hprop) (t : theta) (f : futureCond),
   forward P0 emp fc_default
     (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
     Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default
     (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e))
        (pval actual_arg)) Q t f) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop) (t : theta)
     (f f_ctx : futureCond) (t_ctx : theta)
     (f_ctx' : futureCond) (e : expr),
   forward P0 emp fc_default e Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default e Q t f ->
   futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
   P P0 t_ctx f_ctx e Q (seq t_ctx t)
     (fc_conj f_ctx' f)) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (v : val) (h : loc),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pref (pval v))
     (fun res : val =>
      P0 \* h ~~> v \* \[res = vloc h])
     (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h)))
     (fc_singleton
        (seq trace_default
           (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))) ->
  forall (h : hprop) (t : theta) (f : futureCond)
    (e : expr) (h0 : val -> hprop) (t0 : theta)
    (f0 : futureCond),
  forward h t f e h0 t0 f0 -> P h t f e h0 t0 f0
forward_ind:
  forall
    P : hprop ->
        theta ->
        futureCond ->
        expr ->
        (val -> hprop) -> theta -> futureCond -> Prop,
  (forall (P1 : hprop) (P2 : val -> hprop)
     (P3 : hprop) (P4 : val -> hprop) (t' : theta)
     (f' : futureCond) (t : theta) (f : futureCond)
     (e : expr),
   forward P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f' ->
   P P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f' ->
   P1 ==> P3 ->
   P4 ===> P2 ->
   inclusion t' t ->
   futureCondEntail f f' ->
   P P1 emp fc_default e P2 t f) ->
  (forall (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr) (P0 : hprop)
     (Q Q1 : val -> hprop) (t2 t3 : theta)
     (f2 f3 : futureCond),
   forward P0 emp fc_default e1 Q t2 f2 ->
   P P0 emp fc_default e1 Q t2 f2 ->
   (forall v : val,
    forward (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
   (forall v : val,
    P (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (plet x e1 e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
  (forall (v : val) (P0 : hprop),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pval v)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = v]) emp
     fc_default) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (ev : event),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pevent ev)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = vunit])
     (theta_singleton ev) fc_default) ->
  (forall (b : bool) (e1 e2 : expr) (t : theta)
     (f : futureCond) (P0 : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop),
   forward P0 emp fc_default (if b then e1 else e2) Q
     t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (if b then e1 else e2) Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (pif (pval (vbool b)) e1 e2) Q
     t f) ->
  (forall (loc : loc) (v : Val.value),
   P (loc ~~> v) emp fc_default
     (pderef (pval (vloc loc)))
     (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = v]) emp
     fc_default) ->
  (forall (loc : loc) (v : val) (v' : Val.value),
   P (loc ~~> v') emp fc_default
     (passign (pval (vloc loc)) (pval v))
     (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = vunit])
     emp fc_default) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (f1 : futureCond),
   P P0 emp fc_default (passume f1)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = vunit]) emp f1) ->
  (forall (fromal_arg : var) (e : expr)
     (actual_arg : val) (P0 : hprop)
     (Q : val -> hprop) (t : theta) (f : futureCond),
   forward P0 emp fc_default
     (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
     Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default
     (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e))
        (pval actual_arg)) Q t f) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop) (t : theta)
     (f f_ctx : futureCond) (t_ctx : theta)
     (f_ctx' : futureCond) (e : expr),
   forward P0 emp fc_default e Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default e Q t f ->
   futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
   P P0 t_ctx f_ctx e Q (seq t_ctx t)
     (fc_conj f_ctx' f)) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (v : val) (h : loc),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pref (pval v))
     (fun res : val =>
      P0 \* h ~~> v \* \[res = vloc h])
     (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h)))
     (fc_singleton
        (seq trace_default
           (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))) ->
  forall (h : hprop) (t : theta) (f : futureCond)
    (e : expr) (h0 : val -> hprop) (t0 : theta)
    (f0 : futureCond),
  forward h t f e h0 t0 f0 -> P h t f e h0 t0 f0
(use "About" for full details on the implicit
 arguments of hstar_hforall, qwand_cancel,
 himpl_frame_lr, himpl_hstar_trans_l,
 himpl_hstar_trans_r, himpl_hstar_hpure_l,
 hwand_curry, hwand_uncurry, himpl_hwand_r_inv,
 himpl_frame_l and himpl_frame_r)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
(h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h]) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) (h : heap),
(\[P] \* H) h = (P /\ H h)
(h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h]) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
hstar_hgc_hgc: \GC \* \GC = \GC
hstar_htop_htop: \Top \* \Top = \Top
hstar_hempty_l: forall H : hprop, \[] \* H = H
hstar_hempty_r: forall H : hprop, H \* \[] = H
hstars_pick_1: forall H1 H : hprop, H1 \* H = H1 \* H
hstar_comm: forall H1 H2 : hprop, H1 \* H2 = H2 \* H1
hstars_pick_last_2:
  forall H1 H2 : hprop, H1 \* H2 = H2 \* H1
hstars_flip_1:
  forall H1 : hprop, H1 \* \[] = H1 \* \[]
hwand_cancel:
  forall H1 H2 : hprop, H1 \* (H1 \-* H2) ==> H2
hfalse_hstar_any:
  forall H : hprop, \[False] \* H = \[False]
himpl_frame_r:
  forall [H1 H2 H2' : hprop],
  H2 ==> H2' -> H1 \* H2 ==> H1 \* H2'
himpl_frame_l:
  forall [H2 H1 H1' : hprop],
  H1 ==> H1' -> H1 \* H2 ==> H1' \* H2
hstars_pick_2:
  forall H1 H2 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H = H2 \* H1 \* H
hstar_comm_assoc:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 = H2 \* H1 \* H3
hstar_assoc:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  (H1 \* H2) \* H3 = H1 \* H2 \* H3
hstars_pick_last_3:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 = H3 \* H1 \* H2
star_post_empty:
  forall [B : Type] (Q : B -> hprop), Q \*+ \[] = Q
himpl_hwand_r_inv:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 : hprop],
  H1 ==> H2 \-* H3 -> H2 \* H1 ==> H3
himpl_hwand_r:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 : hprop],
  H2 \* H1 ==> H3 -> H1 ==> H2 \-* H3
hstars_flip_2:
  forall H1 H2 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* \[] = H2 \* H1 \* \[]
hwand_uncurry:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 : hprop],
  H1 \-* H2 \-* H3 ==> H1 \* H2 \-* H3
xsimpl_demo_hwand_r:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 ==> H1 \* (H3 \-* H2 \* H3)
himpl_hstar_hpure_r:
  forall [P : Prop] [H H' : hprop],
  P -> H ==> H' -> H ==> \[P] \* H'
hwand_curry:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 : hprop],
  H1 \* H2 \-* H3 ==> H1 \-* H2 \-* H3
hstars_simpl_start:
  forall [H1 H2 : hprop],
  H1 \* \[] ==> \[] \* H2 \* \[] -> H1 ==> H2
himpl_hstar_hpure_l:
  forall [P : Prop] [H H' : hprop],
  (P -> H ==> H') -> \[P] \* H ==> H'
xsimpl_demo_hfalse:
  forall [H1 : hprop] (H2 : hprop),
  H1 ==> \[False] -> H1 \* H2 ==> \[False]
hwand_curry_eq:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \-* H3 = H1 \-* H2 \-* H3
hstar_hpure_conj:
  forall H1 H2 : Prop, \[H1] \* \[H2] = \[H1 /\ H2]
himpl_hstar_trans_r:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop],
  H1 ==> H2 -> H3 \* H2 ==> H4 -> H3 \* H1 ==> H4
himpl_hstar_trans_l:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop],
  H1 ==> H2 -> H2 \* H3 ==> H4 -> H1 \* H3 ==> H4
himpl_frame_lr:
  forall [H1 H1' H2 H2' : hprop],
  H1 ==> H1' -> H2 ==> H2' -> H1 \* H2 ==> H1' \* H2'
HS.himpl_hstar_trans_l:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop],
  H1 ==> H2 -> H2 \* H3 ==> H4 -> H1 \* H3 ==> H4
hwand_equiv:
  forall H0 H1 H2 : hprop,
  H0 ==> H1 \-* H2 <-> H1 \* H0 ==> H2
hstars_simpl_keep:
  forall [H1 Ha H Ht : hprop],
  H1 ==> (H \* Ha) \* Ht -> H1 ==> Ha \* H \* Ht
hstars_simpl_cancel:
  forall [H1 Ha : hprop] (H : hprop) [Ht : hprop],
  H1 ==> Ha \* Ht -> H \* H1 ==> Ha \* H \* Ht
qwand_cancel:
  forall [A : Type] [Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop],
  Q1 \*+ (Q1 \--* Q2) ===> Q2
xsimpl_demo_hgc_multiple:
  forall (H1 : hprop) [H2 : hprop],
  haffine H2 -> H1 \* H2 \* \GC ==> H1 \* \GC \* \GC
hstar_hpure_l:
  forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) (h : heap),
  (\[P] \* H) h = (P /\ H h)
hstars_pick_3:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H = H3 \* H1 \* H2 \* H
hstar_hforall:
  forall [H : hprop] [A : Type] [J : A -> hprop],
  (\forall xn, J xn) \* H ==> \forall x : A, J x \* H
H5:
  forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) (h : heap),
  (\[P] \* H) h = (P /\ H h)
hstars_pick_last_4:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 = H4 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3
hstar_hpure_r:
  forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) (h : heap),
  (H \* \[P]) h = (H h /\ P)
hstars_flip_3:
  forall H1 H2 H3 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* \[] = H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
hstar_hexists:
  forall [A : Type] (J : A -> hprop) (H : hprop),
  (\exists xn, J xn) \* H = \exists x : A, J x \* H
hstar_hsingle_same_loc:
  forall (p : loc) (w1 w2 : Val.value),
  p ~~> w1 \* p ~~> w2 ==> \[False]
xsimpl_demo_hwand:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop,
  (H1 \-* H2 \-* H3) \* H1 \* H4 ==> H2 \-* H3 \* H4
xchange_demo_1:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 : hprop] (H4 H5 H6 : hprop),
  H1 ==> H2 \* H3 -> H1 \* H4 ==> H5 \-* H6
xchange_demo_4:
  forall [A : Type] [Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop] (H : hprop),
  Q1 ===> Q2 -> Q1 \*+ H ===> Q2 \*+ H
xchange_lemma:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop],
  H1 ==> H2 ->
  H3 ==> H1 \* (H2 \-* protect H4) -> H3 ==> H4
demo_hstars_simpl_1:
  forall (H1 : hprop) [H2 : hprop] (H3 H4 : hprop)
    [H5 : hprop],
  H2 ==> H5 ->
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 ==> H4 \* H5 \* H3 \* H1
hstars_pick_4:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H =
  H4 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H
demo_hstars_pick_1:
  forall [H1 H2 H3 H4 Hresult : hprop],
  (forall H : hprop,
   H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 = H -> H = Hresult -> True) ->
  True
himpl_qwand_r:
  forall [A : Type] (Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop) (H : hprop),
  Q1 \*+ H ===> Q2 -> H ==> Q1 \--* Q2
hstars_pick_last_5:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 =
  H5 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4
xsimpl_demo_qwand_r:
  forall [A : Type],
  A ->
  forall Q1 : A -> hprop,
  (A -> hprop) ->
  forall H1 H2 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 ==> H1 \* (Q1 \--* Q1 \*+ H2)
xsimpl_demo_hwand_multiple_1:
  forall [H1 : hprop] (H2 H3 : hprop) [H4 H5 : hprop],
  H1 \-* H4 ==> H5 ->
  (H2 \* (H1 \* H2 \* H3 \-* H4)) \* H3 ==> H5
hstars_flip_4:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* \[] =
  H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
xsimpl_demo_hwand_iter:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* (H1 \* H3 \-* H4 \-* H5) \* H4 ==>
  (H2 \-* H3) \-* H5
xsimpl_demo_qwand:
  forall [A : Type] (x : A) (Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop)
    (H1 : hprop),
  H1 \* (H1 \-* Q1 \--* Q2) \* Q1 x ==> Q2 x
xsimpl_demo_hwand_multiple_2:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 : hprop,
  (H1 \* H2 \* (H1 \* H3 \-* H4 \-* H5)) \*
  (H2 \-* H3) \* H4 ==> H5
qwand_equiv:
  forall (H : hprop) [A : Type] (Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop),
  H ==> Q1 \--* Q2 <-> Q1 \*+ H ===> Q2
fw_val:
  forall (v : val) (P : hprop),
  forward P emp fc_default (pval v)
    (fun res : val => P \* \[res = v]) emp fc_default
hstar_intro:
  forall (H1 H2 : hprop) [h1 h2 : heap],
  H1 h1 ->
  H2 h2 ->
  Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 -> (H1 \* H2) (h1 \u h2)
hstars_pick_5:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H =
  H5 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H
hstars_pick_last_6:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 =
  H6 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5
hstars_flip_5:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* \[] =
  H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
fw_assume:
  forall (P : hprop) (f1 : futureCond),
  forward P emp fc_default (passume f1)
    (fun res : val => P \* \[res = vunit]) emp f1
xchange_demo_2:
  forall [A : Type] (Q : A -> hprop)
    [H1 H2 H3 : hprop],
  H1 ==> \exists x : A, Q x \* (H2 \-* H3) ->
  H1 \* H2 ==> \exists x : A, Q x \* H3
hstars_pick_6:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H =
  H6 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H
hstars_pick_last_7:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 =
  H7 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6
fw_event:
  forall (P : hprop) (ev : event),
  forward P emp fc_default (pevent ev)
    (fun res : val => P \* \[res = vunit])
    (theta_singleton ev) fc_default
xsimpl_lr_exit:
  forall [Hla Hra Hrg : hprop],
  Hla ==> Hra \* Hrg ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[]) (Hra, Hrg, \[])
hstars_flip_6:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* \[] =
  H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
xsimpl_start:
  forall [H1 H2 : hprop],
  Xsimpl (\[], \[], H1 \* \[]) (\[], \[], H2 \* \[]) ->
  H1 ==> H2
xsimpl_lr_hwand_hfalse:
  forall Hla H1 : hprop,
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((\[False] \-* H1) \* \[], \[], \[])
xsimpl_r_htop_drop:
  forall (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, \Top \* Hrt)
xsimpl_r_hgc_drop:
  forall (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, \GC \* Hrt)
xsimpl_r_hempty:
  forall (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, \[] \* Hrt)
xsimpl_l_hempty:
  forall (Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, \[] \* Hlt) HR
hstars_pick_7:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H =
  H7 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H
hstars_pick_last_8:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 =
  H8 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7
xsimpl_r_keep:
  forall (H Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (H \* Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, H \* Hrt)
xsimpl_l_acc_wand:
  forall (H Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, H \* Hlw, Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, H \* Hlt) HR
xsimpl_l_keep_wand:
  forall (H Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (H \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, H \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
xsimpl_r_hgc_or_htop:
  forall (H Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, H \* Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, H \* Hrt)
xsimpl_l_acc_other:
  forall (H Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (H \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, H \* Hlt) HR
himpl_lr_qwand_unify:
  forall [A : Type] (Q : A -> hprop) (Hla : hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((Q \--* Q \*+ Hla) \* \[], \[], \[])
hstars_flip_7:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* \[] =
  H7 \* H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
xchange_demo_hforall_l:
  (forall (A : Type) (x : A) (J : A -> hprop),
   \forall xn, J xn ==> J x) ->
  forall (Q : int -> hprop) (H1 : hprop),
  (\forall x : int, Q x) \* H1 ==> Q 2 \* \Top
xsimpl_r_hwand_same:
  forall (H Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, (H \-* H) \* Hrt)
fw_deref:
  forall (loc : loc) (v : Val.value),
  forward (loc ~~> v) emp fc_default
    (pderef (pval (vloc loc)))
    (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = v]) emp
    fc_default
xsimpl_r_hpure:
  forall [P : Prop] (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  P ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, \[P] \* Hrt)
xsimpl_l_hpure:
  forall [P : Prop] (Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  (P -> Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) HR) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, \[P] \* Hlt) HR
xsimpl_demo_hint:
  forall (H1 : hprop) (Q : int -> hprop),
  Q 4 ==> Q 3 ->
  H1 \* Q 4 ==> \exists x : int, Q x \* H1
xsimpl_r_htop_replace_hgc:
  forall (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, \Top \* Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, \GC \* Hrg, \Top \* Hrt)
hstars_pick_last_9:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H9 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H9 =
  H9 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8
hstar_inv:
  forall [H1 H2 : hprop] [h : heap],
  (H1 \* H2) h ->
  exists h1 h2 : heap,
    H1 h1 /\
    H2 h2 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 /\ h = h1 \u h2
hstars_pick_8:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H =
  H8 \* H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H
xsimpl_l_cancel_hwand_hempty:
  forall (H2 Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, H2 \* Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, (\[] \-* H2) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
hstars_flip_8:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 : hprop,
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* \[] =
  H8 \* H7 \* H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
fw_assign:
  forall (loc : loc) (v : val) (v' : Val.value),
  forward (loc ~~> v') emp fc_default
    (passign (pval (vloc loc)) (pval v))
    (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = vunit]) emp
    fc_default
xsimpl_r_id_unify:
  forall [A : Type] (x : A) (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, repr (Id x) x \* Hrt)
xsimpl_r_hexists:
  forall [A : Type] (x : A) (J : A -> hprop)
    (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop) (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, J x \* Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, (\exists xn, J xn) \* Hrt)
xsimpl_l_hexists:
  forall [A : Type] (J : A -> hprop)
    (Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop) (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  (forall x : A, Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, J x \* Hlt) HR) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, (\exists xn, J xn) \* Hlt) HR
hstars_pick_9:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H9 H : hprop,
  H1 \*
  H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H9 \* H =
  H9 \*
  H1 \* H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H
xsimpl_l_cancel_hwand:
  forall (H1 H2 Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (\[], Hlw, Hla \* H2 \* Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (H1 \* Hla, (H1 \-* H2) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
xsimpl_l_cancel_hwand_hstar_hempty:
  forall (H2 H3 Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, (H2 \-* H3) \* Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, (\[] \* H2 \-* H3) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
hstars_flip_9:
  forall H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 H7 H8 H9 : hprop,
  H1 \*
  H2 \* H3 \* H4 \* H5 \* H6 \* H7 \* H8 \* H9 \* \[] =
  H9 \*
  H8 \* H7 \* H6 \* H5 \* H4 \* H3 \* H2 \* H1 \* \[]
himpl_lr_htop:
  forall (Hla : hprop) [Hrg : hprop],
  Xsimpl (\[], \[], \[]) (\[], Hrg, \[]) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[]) (\[], \Top \* Hrg, \[])
Xsimpl_trans_r:
  forall [Hra1 Hrg1 Hrt1 Hra2 Hrg2 Hrt2 : hprop]
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl HL (Hra2, Hrg2, Hrt2) ->
  Hra2 \* Hrg2 \* Hrt2 ==> Hra1 \* Hrg1 \* Hrt1 ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra1, Hrg1, Hrt1)
Xsimpl_trans_l:
  forall [Hla1 Hlw1 Hlt1 Hla2 Hlw2 Hlt2 : hprop]
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla2, Hlw2, Hlt2) HR ->
  Hla1 \* Hlw1 \* Hlt1 ==> Hla2 \* Hlw2 \* Hlt2 ->
  Xsimpl (Hla1, Hlw1, Hlt1) HR
xsimpl_l_cancel_hwand_hstar:
  forall (H1 H2 H3 Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, (H2 \-* H3) \* Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (H1 \* Hla, (H1 \* H2 \-* H3) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
xsimpl_l_hwand_reorder:
  forall [H1 H1' : hprop] (H2 Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop)
    (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  H1 = H1' ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, (H1' \-* H2) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, (H1 \-* H2) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
xsimpl_demo_repr_1:
  forall (p q : int) (R : int -> int -> hprop),
  repr (R 3) p \* repr (R 4) q ==>
  \exists n m : int, repr (R n) p \* repr (R m) q
xsimpl_r_id:
  forall [A : Type] [x X : A] (Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop)
    (HL : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  X = x ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl HL (Hra, Hrg, repr (Id X) x \* Hrt)
xsimpl_lr_cancel_same:
  forall (H : hprop) [Hla Hlw Hlt Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop],
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl (H \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, Hrg, H \* Hrt)
himpl_lr_hgc:
  forall [Hla Hrg : hprop],
  haffine Hla ->
  Xsimpl (\[], \[], \[]) (\[], Hrg, \[]) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[]) (\[], \GC \* Hrg, \[])
xsimpl_lr_hwand:
  forall [H1 H2 Hla : hprop],
  Xsimpl (\[], \[], H1 \* Hla) (\[], \[], H2 \* \[]) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((H1 \-* H2) \* \[], \[], \[])
xsimpl_lr_cancel_hgc:
  forall [Hla Hlw Hlt Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop],
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, \GC \* Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl (\GC \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, \GC \* Hrg, Hrt)
xsimpl_lr_cancel_htop:
  forall (H : hprop) [Hla Hlw Hlt Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop],
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, \Top \* Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl (H \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, \Top \* Hrg, Hrt)
xsimpl_l_cancel_qwand:
  forall [A : Type] (x : A) (Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop)
    (Hla Hlw Hlt : hprop) (HR : hprop * hprop * hprop),
  Xsimpl (\[], Hlw, Hla \* Q2 x \* Hlt) HR ->
  Xsimpl (Q1 x \* Hla, (Q1 \--* Q2) \* Hlw, Hlt) HR
xsimpl_lr_hforall:
  forall [A : Type] (J : A -> hprop) [Hla : hprop],
  (forall x : A,
   Xsimpl (\[], \[], Hla) (\[], \[], J x \* \[])) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((\forall xn, J xn) \* \[], \[], \[])
xsimpl_lr_cancel_eq:
  forall [H1 H2 Hla Hlw Hlt Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop],
  H1 = H2 ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl (H1 \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, Hrg, H2 \* Hrt)
xsimpl_lr_qwand:
  forall [A : Type] (Q1 Q2 : A -> hprop) [Hla : hprop],
  (forall x : A,
   Xsimpl (\[], \[], Q1 x \* Hla)
     (\[], \[], Q2 x \* \[])) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((Q1 \--* Q2) \* \[], \[], \[])
xsimpl_lr_qwand_unit:
  forall (Q1 Q2 : unit -> hprop) [Hla : hprop],
  Xsimpl (\[], \[], Q1 tt \* Hla)
    (\[], \[], Q2 tt \* \[]) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, \[], \[])
    ((Q1 \--* Q2) \* \[], \[], \[])
xsimpl_lr_cancel_eq_repr:
  forall [A : Type] (p : A) [E1 E2 : A -> hprop]
    [Hla Hlw Hlt Hra Hrg Hrt : hprop],
  E1 = E2 ->
  Xsimpl (Hla, Hlw, Hlt) (Hra, Hrg, Hrt) ->
  Xsimpl (repr E1 p \* Hla, Hlw, Hlt)
    (Hra, Hrg, repr E2 p \* Hrt)
Xsimpl_trans:
  forall
    [Hla1 Hlw1 Hlt1 Hla2 Hlw2 Hlt2 Hra1 Hrg1 Hrt1 Hra2
     Hrg2 Hrt2 : hprop],
  Xsimpl (Hla2, Hlw2, Hlt2) (Hra2, Hrg2, Hrt2) ->
  (Hla2 \* Hlw2 \* Hlt2 ==> Hra2 \* Hrg2 \* Hrt2 ->
   Hla1 \* Hlw1 \* Hlt1 ==> Hra1 \* Hrg1 \* Hrt1) ->
  Xsimpl (Hla1, Hlw1, Hlt1) (Hra1, Hrg1, Hrt1)
fw_malloc:
  forall (P : hprop) (v : val) (h : loc),
  forward P emp fc_default (pref (pval v))
    (fun res : val => P \* h ~~> v \* \[res = vloc h])
    (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h)))
    (fc_singleton
       (seq trace_default
          (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
forward_ind:
  forall
    P : hprop ->
        theta ->
        futureCond ->
        expr ->
        (val -> hprop) -> theta -> futureCond -> Prop,
  (forall (P1 : hprop) (P2 : val -> hprop)
     (P3 : hprop) (P4 : val -> hprop) (t' : theta)
     (f' : futureCond) (t : theta) (f : futureCond)
     (e : expr),
   forward P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f' ->
   P P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f' ->
   P1 ==> P3 ->
   P4 ===> P2 ->
   inclusion t' t ->
   futureCondEntail f f' ->
   P P1 emp fc_default e P2 t f) ->
  (forall (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr) (P0 : hprop)
     (Q Q1 : val -> hprop) (t2 t3 : theta)
     (f2 f3 : futureCond),
   forward P0 emp fc_default e1 Q t2 f2 ->
   P P0 emp fc_default e1 Q t2 f2 ->
   (forall v : val,
    forward (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
   (forall v : val,
    P (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (plet x e1 e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
  (forall (v : val) (P0 : hprop),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pval v)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = v]) emp
     fc_default) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (ev : event),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pevent ev)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = vunit])
     (theta_singleton ev) fc_default) ->
  (forall (b : bool) (e1 e2 : expr) (t : theta)
     (f : futureCond) (P0 : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop),
   forward P0 emp fc_default (if b then e1 else e2) Q
     t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (if b then e1 else e2) Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (pif (pval (vbool b)) e1 e2) Q
     t f) ->
  (forall (loc : loc) (v : Val.value),
   P (loc ~~> v) emp fc_default
     (pderef (pval (vloc loc)))
     (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = v]) emp
     fc_default) ->
  (forall (loc : loc) (v : val) (v' : Val.value),
   P (loc ~~> v') emp fc_default
     (passign (pval (vloc loc)) (pval v))
     (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = vunit])
     emp fc_default) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (f1 : futureCond),
   P P0 emp fc_default (passume f1)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = vunit]) emp f1) ->
  (forall (fromal_arg : var) (e : expr)
     (actual_arg : val) (P0 : hprop)
     (Q : val -> hprop) (t : theta) (f : futureCond),
   forward P0 emp fc_default
     (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
     Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default
     (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e))
        (pval actual_arg)) Q t f) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop) (t : theta)
     (f f_ctx : futureCond) (t_ctx : theta)
     (f_ctx' : futureCond) (e : expr),
   forward P0 emp fc_default e Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default e Q t f ->
   futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
   P P0 t_ctx f_ctx e Q (seq t_ctx t)
     (fc_conj f_ctx' f)) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (v : val) (h : loc),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pref (pval v))
     (fun res : val =>
      P0 \* h ~~> v \* \[res = vloc h])
     (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h)))
     (fc_singleton
        (seq trace_default
           (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))) ->
  forall (h : hprop) (t : theta) (f : futureCond)
    (e : expr) (h0 : val -> hprop) (t0 : theta)
    (f0 : futureCond),
  forward h t f e h0 t0 f0 -> P h t f e h0 t0 f0
forward_sind:
  forall
    P : hprop ->
        theta ->
        futureCond ->
        expr ->
        (val -> hprop) -> theta -> futureCond -> SProp,
  (forall (P1 : hprop) (P2 : val -> hprop)
     (P3 : hprop) (P4 : val -> hprop) (t' : theta)
     (f' : futureCond) (t : theta) (f : futureCond)
     (e : expr),
   forward P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f' ->
   P P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f' ->
   P1 ==> P3 ->
   P4 ===> P2 ->
   inclusion t' t ->
   futureCondEntail f f' ->
   P P1 emp fc_default e P2 t f) ->
  (forall (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr) (P0 : hprop)
     (Q Q1 : val -> hprop) (t2 t3 : theta)
     (f2 f3 : futureCond),
   forward P0 emp fc_default e1 Q t2 f2 ->
   P P0 emp fc_default e1 Q t2 f2 ->
   (forall v : val,
    forward (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
   (forall v : val,
    P (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (plet x e1 e2) Q1 t3 f3) ->
  (forall (v : val) (P0 : hprop),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pval v)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = v]) emp
     fc_default) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (ev : event),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pevent ev)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = vunit])
     (theta_singleton ev) fc_default) ->
  (forall (b : bool) (e1 e2 : expr) (t : theta)
     (f : futureCond) (P0 : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop),
   forward P0 emp fc_default (if b then e1 else e2) Q
     t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (if b then e1 else e2) Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (pif (pval (vbool b)) e1 e2) Q
     t f) ->
  (forall (loc : loc) (v : Val.value),
   P (loc ~~> v) emp fc_default
     (pderef (pval (vloc loc)))
     (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = v]) emp
     fc_default) ->
  (forall (loc : loc) (v : val) (v' : Val.value),
   P (loc ~~> v') emp fc_default
     (passign (pval (vloc loc)) (pval v))
     (fun res : val => loc ~~> v \* \[res = vunit])
     emp fc_default) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (f1 : futureCond),
   P P0 emp fc_default (passume f1)
     (fun res : val => P0 \* \[res = vunit]) emp f1) ->
  (forall (fromal_arg : var) (e : expr)
     (actual_arg : val) (P0 : hprop)
     (Q : val -> hprop) (t : theta) (f : futureCond),
   forward P0 emp fc_default
     (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
     Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default
     (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e))
        (pval actual_arg)) Q t f) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop) (t : theta)
     (f f_ctx : futureCond) (t_ctx : theta)
     (f_ctx' : futureCond) (e : expr),
   forward P0 emp fc_default e Q t f ->
   P P0 emp fc_default e Q t f ->
   futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
   P P0 t_ctx f_ctx e Q (seq t_ctx t)
     (fc_conj f_ctx' f)) ->
  (forall (P0 : hprop) (v : val) (h : loc),
   P P0 emp fc_default (pref (pval v))
     (fun res : val =>
      P0 \* h ~~> v \* \[res = vloc h])
     (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h)))
     (fc_singleton
        (seq trace_default
           (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))) ->
  forall (h : hprop) (t : theta) (f : futureCond)
    (e : expr) (h0 : val -> hprop) (t0 : theta)
    (f0 : futureCond),
  forward h t f e h0 t0 f0 -> P h t f e h0 t0 f0
(use "About" for full details on the implicit
 arguments of hstar_hforall, qwand_cancel,
 himpl_frame_lr, himpl_hstar_trans_l,
 himpl_hstar_trans_r, himpl_hstar_hpure_l,
 hwand_curry, hwand_uncurry, himpl_hwand_r_inv,
 himpl_frame_l and himpl_frame_r)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) (h : heap),
(\[P] \* H) h = (P /\ H h)
(h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h]) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) (h : heap),
(\[P] \* H) h = (P /\ H h)
(\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: (\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v) =
(vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v))
(\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: (\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v) =
(vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v))
H6: forall x y : Prop, x = y -> y -> x
(\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)

v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: (\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v) =
(vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v))
H6: vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v) ->
(\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
(\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)

v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
  
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: (\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v) =
(vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v))
H6: vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v) ->
(\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))
 
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: (\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v) =
(vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v))
H6: vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v) ->
(\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
vloc h = vloc h

H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: (\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v) =
(vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v))
H6: vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v) ->
(\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
(h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)

v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h

futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev :: nil)%mylist f -> 
f = fc_default

  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))

  (fc_singleton

P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist fc_default

  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
 
  exact (futureCondEntail_exact (fc_singleton (seq trace_default (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))).          

Qed. 

Module Examples.

Definition e1 := (pval vunit). 


forward \[] emp fc_default e1
  (fun res : val => \[] \* \[res = vunit]) emp
  fc_default
 

forward \[] emp fc_default e1
  (fun res : val => \[] \* \[res = vunit]) emp
  fc_default

  
H: forall (v : val) (P : hprop),
forward P emp fc_default (pval v)
  (fun res : val => P \* \[res = v]) emp
  fc_default
forward \[] emp fc_default e1
  (fun res : val => \[] \* \[res = vunit]) emp
  fc_default

  
H: forward \[] emp fc_default (pval vunit)
  (fun res : val => \[] \* \[res = vunit]) emp
  fc_default
forward \[] emp fc_default e1
  (fun res : val => \[] \* \[res = vunit]) emp
  fc_default
 
  exact H.  
Qed. 

Definition e2 := (pval vunit). 

End Examples.
